programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Gardens Poker Championship - Part 1
programme.desc: This $10,000 event features wild card Frank Stepuchin playing versus top pros looking to win their first WPT title and $548,000! Chicken wings, all-ins, and more, this final table has it all!

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Gardens Poker Championship - Part 2
programme.desc: This $10,000 event features wild card Frank Stepuchin playing versus top pros looking to win their first WPT title and $548,000! Chicken wings, all-ins, and more, this final table has it all!

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Borgata - Part 1
programme.desc: The third-largest field in WPT history of 1,415 players is down to six playing for $728,000 and to get their name on the WPT Champions Cup. Watch tonight at HyperX Esports Arena to see who wins their share of the $4.5 million prize pool.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Borgata - Part 2
programme.desc: The third-largest field in WPT history of 1,415 players is down to six playing for $728,000 and to get their name on the WPT Champions Cup. Watch tonight at HyperX Esports Arena to see who wins their share of the $4.5 million prize pool.

programme.desc: The third-largest field in WPT history of 1,415 players is down to six playing for $728,000 and to get their name on the WPT Champions Cup. Watch tonight at HyperX Esports Arena to see who wins their share of the $4.5 million prize pool.

programme.desc: The third-largest field in WPT history of 1,415 players is down to six playing for $728,000 and to get their name on the WPT Champions Cup. Watch tonight at HyperX Esports Arena to see who wins their share of the $4.5 million prize pool.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT L.A. Poker Classic - Part 1
programme.desc: $1 million is on the line in Las Vegas! Darren Elias arrives looking for his fifth WPT title against WPT Champion Matas Cimbolas and battled-tested pro David Baker in an epic matchup at HyperX Esports Arena.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT L.A. Poker Classic - Part 2
programme.desc: $1 million is on the line in Las Vegas! Darren Elias arrives looking for his fifth WPT title against WPT Champion Matas Cimbolas and battled-tested pro David Baker in an epic matchup at HyperX Esports Arena.

programme.desc: $1 million is on the line in Las Vegas! Darren Elias arrives looking for his fifth WPT title against WPT Champion Matas Cimbolas and battled-tested pro David Baker in an epic matchup at HyperX Esports Arena.

programme.desc: $1 million is on the line in Las Vegas! Darren Elias arrives looking for his fifth WPT title against WPT Champion Matas Cimbolas and battled-tested pro David Baker in an epic matchup at HyperX Esports Arena.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Seminole Hardrock Poker Showdown - Part 1
programme.desc: A field of 1,360 players is down to six with Maria Ho battling against WPT Champions James Carroll and Eric Afriat for her first WPT title and $715,000 in HyperX Esports Arena in Las Vegas.
programme.sub-title: WPT Seminole Hardrock Poker Showdown - Part 1

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Choctaw - Part 1
programme.desc: The World Poker Tour goes to Durant, Oklahoma for Midwest poker action for WPT Choctaw. A $2 million prize pool is up for grabs as Season XV WPT Choctaw final tablist Craig Varnell plays for his first WPT title and $380,000 at HyperX Esports Arena.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Choctaw - Part 2
programme.desc: The World Poker Tour goes to Durant, Oklahoma for Midwest poker action for WPT Choctaw. A $2 million prize pool is up for grabs as Season XV WPT Choctaw final tablist Craig Varnell plays for his first WPT title and $380,000 at HyperX Esports Arena.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Choctaw - Part 3
programme.desc: The World Poker Tour goes to Durant, Oklahoma for Midwest poker action for WPT Choctaw. A $2 million prize pool is up for grabs as Season XV WPT Choctaw final tablist Craig Varnell plays for his first WPT title and $380,000 at HyperX Esports Arena.

programme.title: Andromeda: Varmen fra et usynlig lys
programme.desc: En eksperimentell tilsløringsenhet slipper Dylan inn i et alternativt univers.

programme.title: Andromeda: De andre
programme.desc: Andromeda blir fanget i en krig mellom to skip, og den inkluderer en dødelig sykdom.

programme.title: Andromeda: Frykt brenner ned til aske
programme.desc: Dylan blir lurt av Rev og kidnappet. Mannskapet finner en uventet alliert i en samler.

programme.title: Andromeda: Tapt i et rom som ikke er der
programme.desc: Abyss har smittet Beka. Mannskapet må finne en måte å redde henne på.
programme.sub-title: Tapt i et rom som ikke er der

programme.title: Andromeda: Forkortelse av djevelens skille
programme.desc: Etter at noe av mannskapet er fanget, blir Harper tvunget til å jobbe på en tidsbro for patriarken.

programme.title: Andromeda: Stoler på Gordian Maze
programme.desc: En spion fra Tri Gemma dukker opp på Andromeda i et forsøk på å stjele stjernekartet.

programme.title: Andromeda: En symmetri av ufullkommenhet
programme.desc: Når Rommie blir for emosjonell, kutter skipet hennes tilgang til diagnostikk.

programme.title: Andromeda: Tid ute av sinn
programme.desc: Abyss dreper Bekas venn, og mannskapet må finne ut hvilken informasjon de drepte for.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dissonantintervallet (del 1)
programme.desc: Andromeda redder et skip som returnerer fra fredsforhandlinger med Magog.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dissonantintervallet (del 2)
programme.desc: Magog-angrepet har alvorlige konsekvenser. Andromeda blir ødelagt, Trance og Dylan antas å være de eneste overlevende og Dylan rømmer inn i en tidsrute.

programme.title: Andromeda: Vekten (del 1)
programme.desc: Dylan havner på Seefra, der den overtroiske befolkningen ikke har noen teknologi.

programme.title: Andromeda: Vekten (del 2)
programme.desc: Beka blir dumpet på Seefra etter at Andromeda er stjålet, og Dylan må bevise at skipet er hans.

programme.title: Andromeda: Phear Phactor Phenom
programme.desc: Likevel, på Seefra, finner Dylan Harper, som har tilpasset seg livet der.

programme.title: Andromeda: Engelenes forfall
programme.desc: Det viser seg at Doyle er en android bygget av Harper for å inneholde Rommies kjerneprogrammering.

programme.title: Andromeda: Eschatologi av vår nåtid
programme.desc: Beka vinner en pris fra en radio-DJ, lærer sannheten om Seefra og finner Meethus-diagrammet.

programme.title: Andromeda: Når går rundt ...
programme.desc: En forsker fra det opprinnelige Commonwealth dukker opp, fanget i en tidssløyfe.

programme.title: Andromeda: Forsøk på avrettingsmasse
programme.desc: Flavin kommer tilbake og utløser en gjengkrig og hjelper Dylan til å utvikle seg som et paradin.

programme.title: Andromeda: Så brenn de utemmede landene
programme.desc: En krystall som kan gjenopprette Andromedas kraft blir oppdaget, men for å få den, må Dylan jobbe for gruveeieren.

programme.title: Andromeda: Det som ikke var
programme.desc: Tunneler oppdages på Seefra som kan brukes til å nå åtte andre Seefra-planeter.

programme.title: Andromeda: Testen
programme.desc: Når en gammel mann blir drept, er Beka, Rhade og Harper de viktigste mistenkte og stilles for retten

programme.title: MTV Catfish
programme.desc: Catfish, det populære MTV-programmet som samler par som bare har hatt kontakt via skjermer. I løpet av måneder skal de visstnok ha forelsket seg, men hva skjer når de møtes i virkeligheten for første gang?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoking Out a Killer
programme.desc: A college senior was found raped and murdered near an unpaved footpath used by students to walk from one side of campus to the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Assets
programme.desc: In 2004, Mary Ann Clibbery was found brutally murdered at her Illinois business. Investigators had to determine if this was a robbery gone wrong or a calculated murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: In 2006, Texas real estate agent Sarah Anne Walker was found brutally murdered in a model home. Weeks later, a witness came forward who may have seen the killer. Police used forensic hypnosis to help him recall every detail of the man's appearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoot to Thrill
programme.desc: In 2003, St. Cloud teenager Jason MacLennan returned home after a night out with friends and discovered his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller
programme.desc: In 2006, Nevada politician Kathy Augustine died mysteriously during a re-election campaign. The medical examiner could neither isolate the cause of death, nor explain the tiny puncture wounds discovered during the autopsy.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Cross
programme.desc: In 1996, Virginia Beach police arrive at the Makdessi apartment to find the bloodied bodies of Elise Makdessi and Navy sailor Quincy Brown. But was Brown Elise's lover or her assailant?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dancing with the Devil
programme.desc: In 1999, Patrick McRae was found dead in his Des Moines home and the crime scene was awash with blood. Analysis showed it had come from two people, one of whom was female.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Dance
programme.desc: In 2000, the body of exotic dancer Rachel Siani was found beneath a New Jersey bridge. Investigators wondered if she had committed suicide. They discovered that Rachel offered to assist a drunk customer named John "Jack" Denofa to his motel room.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Constructive Criticism
programme.desc: In 2000, construction manager Darrell North was found dead in his work trailer in Ft. Worth, Texas. When investigators arrived, they found that he had been stabbed 46 times, indicating a personal relationship between the victim and the attacker.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home Evasion
programme.desc: In 2000, Judy Southern arrived home from work and was shot by a gunman waiting within. Her husband arrived shortly afterwards, called emergency services and drove her to the hospital.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Window Watcher
programme.desc: In 1986, Gary Dale Larson was stabbed to death in his Edmond, Oklahoma home. The killer then sexually assaulted Larson's girlfriend, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: In 1991, Dorothy Donovan was murdered in her Dover, Delaware home. When her son stated that she was murdered by a hitchhiker he had picked up, police were skeptical.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kidnapping
programme.desc: In 2001, Ginger Hayes and her infant son were abducted during a carjacking. The crime had been reported by a witness within minutes of occurrence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sands of Crime
programme.desc: In the early hours of a morning just before Christmas, a college student was abducted from the parking lot of her apartment. Her body was found later that day; she had been sexually assaulted and shot at point-blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Calculated Coincidence
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead in her apartment. With little evidence at the scene, the case turns cold — until police discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sworded Scheme
programme.desc: When a college student is reported missing, police believe their investigation will be like countless others. But when they discover blood spatter in her boyfriend's bedroom, they know this case is going to be different.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unmasked
programme.desc: A serial rapist is on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fashion Police
programme.desc: The victim had been stabbed more than thirty times and the crime scene was awash with her blood. Near her head, police discovered a distinctive button with strands of thread still attached.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Dis-service
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services, then disappears. When her abandoned car is found, the tank is empty and a gas can she kept in her trunk for emergencies is missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seedy Intentions
programme.desc: When a 9-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic's vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Digital enhancement of security camera footage shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction. When investigators suspect the crimes are not random, they fear a serial killer may be on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: The woman had been sexually assaulted, stabbed repeatedly and left for dead. When a perfect suspect practically turned himself in, police were sure they had their man until DNA evidence proved them wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: The victim was a self-made man who never minced words. Perhaps he was murdered by a disgruntled client or employee. Perhaps the racy photos in his safe held the clue to solving the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Drowning Sorrows
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a nightmare when a woman is found face-down in a lake.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As Fault
programme.desc: Witnesses saw a woman in the back of a truck, flailing her arms and screaming. When they found a jacket near a pool of blood, they knew what they had seen wasn't a joy ride.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties
programme.desc: When court clerk Peter Porco doesn't report to work in November 2004, a courts officer is ordered to the Porcos' family home in Bethlehem, NY.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trouble Brewing
programme.desc: Two suspects are linked to a murder by bloodstained boots and a gun, but the owner of the items says he has never met the victim. Investigators hope manufacturing codes from beer bottles will determine who is telling the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: This episode documents a deadly bombing at a church in Oakwood, Illinois, in December 1997.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no clear reason for a young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the coroner discovered a tiny clue during the autopsy, investigators were able to uncover a mystery filled with betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Room with a View
programme.desc: A young woman is stabbed more than 100 times. The killer leaves DNA behind, but investigators must play a cat-and-mouse game to obtain a suspect's DNA to match.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve 2005, a man's body is found burning near Baltimore. He's eventually identified as 26-year-old Wesley Person. Distinctive building materials from the 1930s play a crucial role in solving this case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why a young scientist has fallen gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All that Glitters is Gold
programme.desc: Police discover a bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses. Had the victim been abducted or was she dead? The answers are found in a unique clue, so tiny it was measured in millionths of a meter.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Even though their daughter had run away before, she had always come back. Her parents were sure this time would be no different, but they were wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: In little more than a month, two women who lived in the same apartment complex were brutally murdered. The similarities of the crime scenes led police to conclude they were dealing with a serial killer who harbored an intense hatred of women.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Covet Thy Neighbour
programme.desc: When a college student vanished without a trace, her fellow students were concerned about her safety and their own.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: The victim was well liked and successful, which made the brutality of the crime even harder to understand.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hundreds of Reasons
programme.desc: An assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse is stabbed to death. It appears to be a robbery gone wrong, but a bloody fingerprint reveals that he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: In 1985, Julie Estes was kidnapped from the Southside convenience store where she worked. Her body was found the next day, but the killing went unsolved until 2003.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, 35, was convicted of killing David Nixon in April 2002 after he planned to end their relationship.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: A surgeon is stabbed to death and the most likely suspect is seen in a restaurant at the time of the murder.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 12
programme.desc: This episode includes: Comedy Store Ghosts, New Year's Samaritan & UD, UD: Fritz & the Soldiers, NY Serial Rapist & UD and Suspicious Suicide.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 13
programme.desc: This episode includes: Newlywed Escape & UD, Gettysburg Ghosts, Trucker Disappearance & UD and Magic, the Gathering.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 14
programme.desc: This episode includes: Oklahoma City Rescuers, UD: Baby Given Away, Carolina Cop Killer & UD, Vince Foster and Crime Novelist.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 15
programme.desc: This episode includes: Massachusetts Marine, UD: Taunting Bank Robber, Packer Church Fire , Ms. Miracle and Train Wreck Amnesia & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 16
programme.desc: This episode includes: Daughter Seeks Justice, Baseball Amnesia, Casino Bandit & UD and Wickenburg Massacre.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 17
programme.desc: This episode includes: SADD Fugitive, Nazca Lines, Where's Charlotte? and The Entity.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 18

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 19

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 20
programme.desc: This episode includes: Mummy's Curse, Cabbie Bomber, Terrorized Teen and Amtrak Sabotage.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 21
programme.desc: This episode includes: Dennis Cole's Son, UD: Train Wreck Amnesia, Newsman's Lost Love & UD, Amish Hostage Murder & UD and Plateau Vision.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 1
programme.desc: This episode includes: Zodiac/Unabomber & UD, UD: Newsman's Lost Love, Missing College Kids & UD, Trish's Miracle and Picture Taking Fugitive.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 2
programme.desc: This episode includes: Southern Disappearance, Playboy Con Man & UD, UD: Florida Crime Spree, College Student Murders & UD and Message in a Bottle.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 3
programme.desc: This episode includes: Death of a Rock Star & UD, UD: Amish Hostage Murder, Terror by the Book, Home Invasion Spree and Fertility Statues.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 4
programme.desc: This episode includes: Sleepwalking, Murder in the Park, UD: KC Blast, Parallel Lives and Missing Susan & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 5
programme.desc: This episode includes: Storm in Hell, Good Samaritan Abductor, UD: Newlywed Escape, Motorcyclist's Samaritan & UD and Madman Across the Water.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 6
programme.desc: This episode includes: The Blob, Texas A&M Rapist & UD, Qi Gong, Southie & UD and Where's Baby Le-Zahn? & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 7
programme.desc: This episode includes: Love on the Run & UD, Georgetown Arson, Lottery Miracle and Lucky School.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 8
programme.desc: This episode includes: Children's Past Lives, Pet Heroes, Zip Gun Bomber, Hotel Balcony Death & UD and Glendeen's Goal & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 9
programme.desc: This episode includes: Bee Sting Healing, Ranger Bombing Target, UD: Looking for Christopher, Preppie Rape Mistrial & UD and 911 Call for Help.

programme.desc: En 24/7 kanal for folk som er nyskjerrige på mote og design! Supermodellen Heidi Klum er vert for denne spennende reality-serien som gir sultne, talentfulle designere sjansen til å vise frem sitt arbeid for New York.

programme.title: The FBI Files: John Gotti: Convicted
programme.desc: John Gotti was ambitious, powerful and ruthless. He ruled with flash and conspicuous style, playing celebrity with the media and cat and mouse with the FBI. They called John Gotti the Teflon Don. Serious charges just wouldn't stick.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Polly Klaas: Kidnapped
programme.desc: On October 1, 1993, a stranger abducted 12-year-old Polly Klaas during a slumber party in her home.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Firefight
programme.desc: In Miami, a gang of robbers targeted banks and armored cars. They carried assault weapons and weren't afraid to use them. They struck during the day, and sometimes twice a day. For awhile, they seemed unstoppable.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Brutal Abduction
programme.desc: A Chicago street gang thought they had figured out how to kidnap people for ransom again and again, and never get caught. But their one mistake was they underestimated the Federal Bureau of Investigation.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Above the Law
programme.desc: California Highway Patrolman George Gwaltney discovered the body of 23-year-old Robin Bishop near her car on a remote desert highway.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Predator
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, Washington, D.C., became the murder capital of the nation. Few were left untouched by gang violence, which was ignited by the drug trade. By 1994, that violence would strike at the very heart of law enforcement.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Perfect Heist
programme.desc: Bank robbery is a brazen yet simple crime. A mask, a gun, a note passed to a teller. But bank burglary is different. It takes skill to disable an alarm, to penetrate a locked vault.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Death in Alaska
programme.desc: The day began like any other for Cheryl and Paul Chapman, until the silence of a peaceful Sunday morning was shattered with a phone call.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Lost Boys
programme.desc: In June of 1997, a crime wave swept Iowa like a tornado. It left a trail of robbery, kidnapping, and murder in its wake, and then it moved on. No one knew where.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Search For Lisa Rene
programme.desc: When a young woman was grabbed from her Texas home, the police raced to find her abductors. On the face of it, the kidnapping seemed like the random act of desperate men.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Obsession
programme.desc: Power is a responsibility as well as a privilege. But in the wrong hands, power can corrupt. For former Deputy Attorney General for the State of Delaware, losing sight of his sworn oath to uphold justice could prove lethal.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cat and Mouse
programme.desc: He was a predator, abducting girls and young women from their own front yards in broad daylight. He was a sadist: phoning one victim's family, taunting them, boosting then dashing their hope, and he wouldn't stop until we stopped him.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Terror In Disguise
programme.desc: Banks use a variety of devices to discourage would-be robbers: security cameras, silent alarms, and exploding dye packs. But when an elusive bank robber targeted Seattle's banks, none of these precautions were effective.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hired Gun
programme.desc: When three people were found murdered in their home, it appeared like a burglary gone awry. But a crime this horrific deserved a closer look.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Moving Target
programme.desc: When a sniper in Utah started targeting African-American men for death, authorities launched a massive investigation. With scant clues and no witnesses they found the odds stacked against them, and they had no idea where the killer would strike next.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Backstage Murder
programme.desc: In the 1980's, two partners created a nightclub that would bring them wealth and international fame. The male strip club phenomenon promised female patrons fun and excitement. But the bright lights hid a dark side.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Stranger
programme.desc: The body of a young woman found burned in a truck launched a manhunt to find her killer. When more bodies began to turn up across the country, the FBI believed the cases were linked. Investigators had a suspect. They just couldn't find him.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Out To Kill
programme.desc: An abandoned car outside Philadelphia brings heartbreak to a family and terror to a community. A young woman is dead, the killer gone. But the marks of his passage remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Death Grip
programme.desc: Fingerprinting: The Identification Division of the FBI relies on fingerprints as one of the most effective ways to identify criminals.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Blood Money
programme.desc: Some people murder for love. But these killers did it for the money. When greed is the motive, investigators must make every clue pay off.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Killing Time
programme.desc: A killer may strike in the middle of the night, and hide clues well. But the police are always there, ready and working, and they will never give up when they're on the trail of criminals who decide it's Killing Time.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Blind Trust
programme.desc: A woman's body is found and investigators have little time and few clues to lead them to a killer who could strike again. Perpetrators try to conceal their crimes, yet savvy investigators can take the most obscure data and recreate a murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Double Helix
programme.desc: DNA Analysis: With the advent of DNA analysis, just a few microscopic cells found at a crime scene can be used to put a murder behind bars.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stolen Youths
programme.desc: A young girl playing in her yard in Spokane, Washington suddenly vanishes. In St. Louis, another girl leaves to visit a friend. She never arrived.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Electronic Witness
programme.desc: George Orwell's concept of Big Brother remains in the realm of fiction. But as technology becomes more a part of our lives, it's becoming increasingly more difficult to make a move without leaving behind an electronic trace.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Patterns Of Guilt
programme.desc: The tread of a tire, a single shoe print and even the shape of a bruise help investigators track down killers, based solely on their patterns of guilt.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Texas Rangers
programme.desc: Formed in the 1830s to protect settlers against Indian attack, the Rangers became part of the Texas Highway Patrol in 1935. Their role has continued to evolve to keep up with changing times; today it includes sophisticated forensics labs.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fatal Impressions
programme.desc: 911 receives a desperate call in Fort Worth, Texas. A man's wife is shot. Forensic investigators search for clues in unlikely places, hoping the victim herself could provide information needed to determine how and why she died.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Burning Evidence
programme.desc: Identifying Burned Remains: It's difficult to have a murder investigation without a body, and burning up the victim is a time-honored method of destroying physical evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Price of Murder
programme.desc: Using science as their most powerful weapon, investigators must find these hired killers and make them pay the true price of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Critical Evidence
programme.desc: To the astute detective and forensic specialist, the biggest clues often hide in plain sight, and what seems trivial to some is in reality Critical Evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Predators and Parasites
programme.desc: For the forensic entomologist, the insects that nest in dead bodies are like tiny witnesses to a crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Military Justice
programme.desc: The Naval Criminal Investigative Service uses forensic science to solve three perplexing murders and fulfill their motto: "To the living we owe respect; to the dead, we owe the truth."

programme.title: The New Detectives: Bodies of Evidence
programme.desc: It is difficult to convict a murderer if the body can't be found. But forensic science is finding ways to do it. Devious killers can think up many was to dispose of their victim's remains, but they are often no matches for investigators.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: In this chilling investigation, the Ghost Dimension team travel deep into Greenfield Valley to uncover the haunted secrets of Basingwerk Abbey. Once home to Cistercian monks and steeped in centuries of devotion and conflict.
programme.sub-title: Echoes of the Abbey: Hauntings at Greenfield Valley: Part 5

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Halloween Special
programme.desc: Join Bex, Sean and the team as they investigate The Wellington Hotel for Halloween. Based in Halewood, this public inn has more haunting inside of its walls than the spirits behind the bar

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: The Lady in Grey
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate claims of a ghost lady in grey haunting Windleshaw abbey, St Helens, Merseyside. Over 600 years old and with new paranormal encounters reported almost weekly. Bex and Sean attempt to make contact with the infamous lady in grey.

programme.title: Ghost Dimensions Top 10 Scariest Moments
programme.desc: A special look into the top 10 of Ghost Dimension’s scariest moments. Venturing into the UK’s most haunted buildings, we take a look back at the scariest captures.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Scars for Life
programme.desc: Could a tattoo studio be haunted? Has a Ouija board opened a gateway to the spirit dimension? Ghost Dimension spend the night investigating Deviant Ink tattoo studio.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Fort Crosby
programme.desc: Crosby Battery, also known as Crosby Point Battery and Fort Crosby, was an artillery battery situated between Crosby and Hightown in Lancashire, United Kingdom. The battery was used for port defence and anti-aircraft defence during WWII.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Passage in Time
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate Big Condo Studios in Liverpool, UK. Located in one of the most haunted cities in the world and believed to be haunted by some very playful spirits. Will they join the team on their investigation tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Poltergeist House
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate a Poltergeist haunting a homeowner who is a wits end. Poltergeistal activity in the home is terrorizing the tenant and paranormal investigators Bex and Sean are about to start the exorcism of this demonic entity away for good.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Whitby Hall
programme.desc: Built in the early 1800s, Whitby Hall used to be an administrative center and now stands as a public park and arts center. It has never before been investigated, but staff have reported many noises and presences among them.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Razor Ruddock's Home
programme.desc: We visit the home of Soccer legend Neil "Razor" Ruddock which seems to be haunted. Is it his home specifically? Or are these ghosts attached to him?

programme.title: Past Hunters: Mill Street Barracks
programme.desc: Built in 1861 Mill Street Barracks is steeped in rich history. It has accommodated many branches of the armed forces throughout its life. Like many other barracks it has also been used as a morgue making it a prime location for the supernatural.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Stranger in the Blitz
programme.desc: Damaged during the blitz, the location the team investigate was a former war hospital for the injured and wounded, based in Liverpool, UK.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Celebrity Special - The Black Horse in Pluckley Village
programme.desc: Bex and Sean are joined by reality TV star Charlie Doherty in the most haunted village in the UK and investigate the most haunted pub in the UK, The Black Horse.
programme.sub-title: Celebrity Special - The Black Horse in Pluckley Village

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Piano Plays a Ghost Song
programme.desc: Following reports of loud voices and footsteps heard when no one else is around, staff seeing dark shadows fleeting through the empty corridors, to several pianos playing by themselves, Ghost Dimension head into Champness Hall.
programme.sub-title: The Piano Plays a Ghost Song

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Horror at Sandhole Cottage - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean returns to his former, haunted home. No tenant has ever been able to stay the full term. Sean wants to seek out the spirits once and for all, to finally find out what is haunting his former home.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Horror at Sandhole Cottage - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of Sandhole Cottage and appears to be in direct contact with the spirits that haunted any tenants that came to live there. Will he finally get them to rest?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Opening The Book at Leeds Library - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean delves deep and opens a new chapter for the Ghost Dimension Flying Solo series as he investigates Leeds Library, to uncover what is haunting and frightening the staff that work here.
programme.sub-title: Opening The Book at Leeds Library - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Closing The Book at Leeds Library - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation at Leeds Library and attempts to communicate with a spirit known by the name of Sternberg. Will his investigation have a happy ending?
programme.sub-title: Closing The Book at Leeds Library - Part 2

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Forbidden Love
programme.desc: At twelve, Crystal dated 20-year-old Matt and was pregnant at 13. He served 15 months for sexual assault on a minor and is a registered sex offender. Is this inappropriate love or a misunderstanding?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: 16-Year-Old Surrogate Stole Our Baby
programme.desc: Sarah was Dawn and Derek's surrogate, but took off while five months pregnant. Sarah claims that they took advantage of her. Who are the baby's rightful parents?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: She's a Crazy Stalker
programme.desc: Victor met Jasmine a few years ago but claimed they never had sex. Jasmine claims that they fell in love and want him back! Who's telling the truth?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: These DNA Results Will Floor You
programme.desc: Joe met “Jessica” on a phone chat line. A few months later, she revealed she was pregnant. Then, Chastity claims that her ex Trent fathered her child. What will the DNA results reveal?
programme.sub-title: These DNA Results Will Floor You

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Punch a Woman like I Punch a Man
programme.desc: Chelse claims that her 19-month-old daughter is Malcolm's and that he beat her while pregnant. Amber and Phillip accuse each other of being abusive and want the polygraph tests to prove their claims!
programme.sub-title: I Punch a Woman like I Punch a Man

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Slept Around: Who's the Dad?
programme.desc: Tasha wants to prove to her ex Martin that he fathered her four-year-old. Martin's sister says that the child might belong to her boyfriend Terrence. Who's the real father?
programme.sub-title: I Slept Around: Who's the Dad?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Bullied Out of School
programme.desc: Aabrea and Jerae bullied a high school girl so badly that she dropped out. Can Steve help them resolve their differences and figure out why so many teens turn to bullying?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Extreme Deception Indicated
programme.desc: Joe and Tammy have been together for six years and they have two children. Joe faces cheating accusations again and returns to Steve's stage for his lie detector results!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve, I Think He's Gay
programme.desc: Monique’s friend claims that Adrian advertised himself on a “Gay for Pay” website. Then, pregnant Tyeasha suspects David of cheating on her with men. What will the polygraph say?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Wouldn't Wish This on Anybody
programme.desc: On today's Steve Wilkos, will the lie detector results reveal if Tamisha and Simone's men were faithful? Or will it reveal some more sinister results?
programme.sub-title: I Wouldn't Wish This on Anybody

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: The Devastating Truth
programme.desc: Desiaree refuses to believe her sister or mother's accusations against her father. Are their lies are keeping him in prison? Find out today!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Outraged!
programme.desc: Lagraciala tragically lost her ten month old son and cremated him, but after a serious fight with her fiancée AJ, she couldn't find the ashes. AJ admits to threatening to steal the ashes, but denies he took them!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Do Not Touch Her on My Stage
programme.desc: Scott and Dawn want their sister Betty to leave her boyfriend Michael because he's allegedly violent. The drama will explode when Scott confronts Michael on our stage today!
programme.sub-title: Do Not Touch Her on My Stage

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Shocking Statement
programme.desc: Today on Steve Wilkos, Vanessa reveals a secret she's been hiding from her boyfriend and Joel takes a DNA test to determine if he fathered Melissa's son!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Ever Have My Baby?
programme.desc: Since he never saw evidence of her pregnancy, Robert is here to find out if his ex-girlfriend Sara was ever pregnant with their child. What will his lie detector results reveal?
programme.sub-title: Did You Ever Have My Baby?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Chose the Molester Over Your Kids
programme.desc: Jackie’s family doesn't trust her boyfriend around her children, but she insists on staying with him. What horrible truth will Shaqualla's lie detector test reveal about her man?
programme.sub-title: You Chose the Molester Over Your Kids

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Do I Have a Child With a Gay Man?
programme.desc: Are Tracy and Latonia's men leading secret double lives with other men? What will the lie detector test results reveal about Kanecha and Mike?
programme.sub-title: Do I Have a Child With a Gay Man?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: DNA Shockers
programme.desc: Monique and Ashley find out who their newborn babies' fathers are on today's Steve Wilkos Show!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: This Should Be Explosive...
programme.desc: Katrina believes her sister Kendra’s boyfriend is a cheater and having sex with her best friend Nay-Nay! Later, John returns to the stage with a shocking update!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Do You Need a Medic or Are You Guilty?
programme.desc: Michelle needs answers about who hurt her daughter. She will stop at nothing to protect her baby. Will the father James clear his name on Steve's stage?
programme.sub-title: Do You Need a Medic or Are You Guilty?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: DNA: Don't Run From the Results
programme.desc: Roberta suspects that her husband Bryan has been cheating. They both believe the other is cheating. Find out whether these men are really the father on today's Steve Wilkos!
programme.sub-title: DNA: Don't Run From the Results

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: He Said Give Your Baby Away and You Did
programme.desc: Shannan claims Tim fathered her child. He doesn't buy it because he doesn't recall having sex with her! Later, Ayana is furious that her boyfriend Patrick denies their son!
programme.sub-title: He Said Give Your Baby Away and You Did

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Stuck In A Coffin
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a five-alarm fire, first responders discover a lifeless body. When Kenda learns that the deadly blaze was no accident, he launches a manhunt.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Highway
programme.desc: One is dead and two are in critical condition, and it’s up to Kenda and Barry to find out why a gun battle occurred in a quaint family home.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Comes Knocking
programme.desc: Neighbors are aghast when Ernestine Addison and her teen son Bobby are gunned down in cold blood. The case heats up when Kenda receives word that the killer’s murderous rampage isn’t over just yet.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lock the Door
programme.desc: Soon after the lifeless body of Charlie Tuttle was discovered behind a locked bedroom door, his death was ruled a suicide. But six months later, Kenda receives an unprompted confession .

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Officer Down
programme.desc: Sgt. Joe Kenda is faced with his worst nightmare when he learns a friend and fellow officer, Mark Dabling, has been killed in the line of duty.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bad Moon Rising
programme.desc: The night before Halloween, a real-life nightmare unfolds when a young man is found clinging to life. The case takes a dark turn when Lt. Joe Kenda learns there is a second victim somewhere in the woods.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Standoff
programme.desc: A disabled man is killed on the job, but Kenda’s case hits a roadblock when forensic evidence is scrubbed from the scene.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Point of No Return
programme.desc: When a mysterious explosion rocks a sleepy suburb, it’s up to Kenda to ID a pile of charred remains and find the killer who triggered the blast.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Murder Bites
programme.desc: A young woman is found naked and strangled in a park not 200 yards from her home. It isn’t until Lt. Joe Kenda rethinks the entire case that he realizes someone has been lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Invisible Hand of Death
programme.desc: Two teens stumble upon a woman engulfed in flames, leaving detectives to wonder just who in her inner circle could kill so cruelly.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda and his team investigate the scene of an apparent suicide, only to be forced to flee when they discover the house is booby-trapped.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Human Animal
programme.desc: The naked body of a vibrant young mother is found frozen solid in a deserted cemetery. Kenda reopens the investigation and recognizes the sinister hallmark of a serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Trigger
programme.desc: A sharp-dressed pedestrian is shot in the back for unknown reasons. Chasing a promising lead, Kenda realizes he’s barking up the wrong tree.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Loose Cannon
programme.desc: In the dead of night, a shooter on a rampage rips through a home, leaving a grandmother disfigured, her 24 year old daughter dead, and a two year-old child clinging to life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Grip
programme.desc: When a speeding truck crashes into a residential building, officers find the lifeless body of Michael Faast behind the wheel. But he didn’t die in the wreck – he was shot point-blank in the temple.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: After School Special
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when a beloved teacher is poisoned in her classroom. As doctors fight to save Barbara Lewis’ life, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team delve into her personal affairs.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: 12 Years a Fugitive
programme.desc: When a beloved grandmother is found stabbed to death in her own home, Kenda must turn to a tight-knit community still grieving from the tragic loss.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Poker Face
programme.desc: A group of friends discover the corpse of entrepreneur Jamie Foster hidden under a blanket. Kenda e discovers that Foster’s business put him in close quarters with a host of unsavory characters.

programme.title: The Hills: A Change of Plans
programme.desc: Når Heidi fikser et intervju for drømmejobben som får henne til å overveie å hoppe av skolen permanent, forstår Lauren at hun og Heidi kanskje har helt forskjellige mål.

programme.title: The Hills: An Unexpected Call
programme.desc: Teen Vogue sender Lauren på et oppdrag til New York City, men vel tilbake i L.A. venter det henne en stor overraskelse fra fortiden. Heidi skjønner at å jobbe med festreklamering ikke bare er en fest.

programme.title: The Hills: Lauren and Jason: Part 2
programme.desc: Da Jason, Laurens eksflamme fra Laguna Beach, dukker opp igjen i livet hennes, forstår hun at hun kanskje ikke er så ferdig med ham som hun trodde. Samtidig, i sin nye jobb, spør Heidi seg om det egentlig er verdt alt strevet.

programme.title: The Hills: Jason's Birthday
programme.desc: Lauren haster hjem fra en lang Teen Vogue-event for å være sammen med Jason på bursdagen hans, men kvelden blir ikke som forventet. Audrina ber Heidi om råd rundt hennes nyeste date, modellen og skuespilleren Danny.

programme.title: The Hills: Boyfriends and Work Don't Mix
programme.desc: Jason utvikler seg til å bli et forstyrrende moment i Laurens profesjonelle og akademiske liv. Heidi får endelig mulighet til å jobbe i nattklubbene, men tidspunktet kunne ikke ha vært dårligere.

programme.title: The Hills: Somebody Always Has to Cry
programme.desc: Det er gjengens første ferie i L.A. og ikke alle får det de ønsket seg. Et nyttårskyss skal vise seg å bli litt av en oppgave for Lauren, når Jason finner ut at hun fikk en uventet telefon fra en gammel flamme.

programme.title: The Hills: You Can't Just Be With Me?
programme.desc: Jason vil gjerne gjøre Laurens 20-årsdag spesiell, men når hun lyver for ham angående en jobb med mannelige modeller for et Teen Vogue-oppdrag, settes forholdet deres på prøve.
programme.sub-title: You Can't Just Be With Me?

programme.title: The Hills: Love is Not a Maybe Thing
programme.desc: Heidi bestemmer endelig at hun har opplevd nok dramatikk med Jordan. Lauren og Jason tenker på å gå et hakk videre.
programme.sub-title: Love is Not a Maybe Thing

programme.title: The Hills: Timing is Everything
programme.desc: Når Laurens harde jobbing under moteuken i L.A. fører til tidenes største karrieremulighet, føler hun seg dradd mellom jobben sin og kjæresten sin.

programme.title: The Hills: Out With The Old
programme.desc: Etter en vaklevoren sommer med kjæresten Jason, bestemmer Lauren seg for å gjøre det slutt og drar tilbake til Teen Vogue for å møte sin mindre glade sjef. Heidi får problemer med en fyr som både hun og Audrina dater.

programme.title: The Hills: When You Least Expect It
programme.desc: Lauren går på sin første date siden Jason, og blir satt på prøve på jobben når hun bes om å gjøre sitt første moteshow. Heidi har en livsavgjørende hemmelighet hun må fortelle om til kjæresten sin.

programme.title: The Hills: The Best Night Ever
programme.desc: Når Audrina dukker opp i Heidis bursdag uten invitasjon, forstår hun at Heidi ikke er villig til å tilgi og glemme. Lauren, som har bestemt seg for å konsentrere seg om jobben, blir forført av sjarmen til Brody, den nye typen i livet hennes.

programme.title: The Hills: Who Do You Trust?
programme.desc: Audrina forteller Heidi at Spencer er en lurendreier, men Heidi stiller seg tvilende - til hun ser det med egen øyne. Lauren fortsetter å lure på om hun er klar for et forhold.

programme.title: The Hills: One Big Interruption
programme.desc: Heidi tar en pause fra Spencer, men savner ham mer en hun trodde hun ville. Lauren må planlegge en Teen Vogue-middag, men distraheres når hun må hjelpe praktikanten Emily fra New York.

programme.title: The Hills: You Have Chosen
programme.desc: Når Lauren forteller Heidi hva hun egentlig syns om Spencer, må Heidi velge mellom bestevennen sin og kjæresten.

programme.title: The Hills: With Friends Like These...
programme.desc: Lauren forstår at hun ikke kan stole på bestevennene sine etter at Heidi spleiser Jen med Brody.

programme.title: The Hills: Enough Is Enough
programme.desc: Spencer ber Heidi om å flytte inn hos ham, men Heidi vet ikke hva hun skal gjøre, eller hvordan hun skal fortelle det til samboeren Lauren.

programme.title: The Hills: New Year, New Friends
programme.desc: Laurens 21-årsdag er full av overraskelser - Heidi og Audrina holder selskap for henne. Jen gjør et forsøk på å slutte fred med Lauren.

programme.title: The Hills: Apology Not Accepted
programme.desc: Lauren fyller 21 år og Heidi har store planer for bursdagsfeiringen. Men, rett før festen bestemmer Heidi seg for å fortelle Lauren om Spencers ide om at de skal flytte sammen.

programme.title: The Hills: Goodbye for Now
programme.desc: I sesongfinalen når spenningen sitt toppunkt når Heidi tar et endelig valg angående å flytte sammen med Spencer. Lauren går til Audrina for å fylle tomrommet etter bestevennen sin, og Whitney flyr til New York City til et intervju.

programme.title: The Hills: You Know What You Did
programme.desc: Lauren drar ikke til Heidi og Spencers innflyttingsfest da hun får høre at Heidi har spredd rykter om henne. Men når Lauren og Heidi støter på hverandre, begynner de å krangle verre enn de noen gang har gjort før.

programme.title: The Hills: Big Girls Don't Cry
programme.desc: Lauren og Heidi glir enda lenger fra hverandre når Spencer frir til Heidi. Audrina går inn for sitt forhold med en tidligere kjæreste, og Lauren drar tilbake til Laguna Beach for å rådføre seg.

programme.title: The Hills: Truth And Time Tells All
programme.desc: Lauren hjelper Audrina med å avgjøre om Justin er kjærestemateriale, men Audrina har allerede tatt sitt valg. Heidi forstår at å være forlovet ikke bare er lek og alskens moro.

programme.title: The Hills: Meet The Parents
programme.desc: Slik jeg ser det: Opplev dine yndlingsrealityskuespillere og yndlingssituasjoner - med en komisk vri. Alt og all, fra Lauren til Spencer - ingen eller ingenting er trygge for den ene skuespilleren som alene spiller hver eneste rolle i serien.

programme.title: The Hills: Rolling With The Enemy
programme.desc: Heidis omgangskrets minker når Spencer "slår opp" med Brody fordi han vanker med Lauren. Audrina vil at forholdet til Justin skal være offisielt, men han nekter å binde seg.

programme.title: The Hills: Second Chances
programme.desc: Lauren opplever et pust fra fortiden da hennes ekskjæreste Jason ringer. Heidi konkurrerer med kollegaen Elodie om en forfremmelse på jobben.

programme.title: The Hills: They Meet Again
programme.desc: Laurens følelser for Jason flammer opp igjen, men når de støter på Heidi og Spencer på en restaurant, er det mer som slår gnister. Heidis forfremmelse hos Bolthouse koster henne vennskapet med Elodie.

programme.title: The Hills: For Better Or Worse
programme.desc: Lauren får sjokk da hun får vite at Jason har en kjæreste, men Jason har en enda større overraskelse på lager. Heidi finner ut at Spencer ikke har fortalt sine foreldre om gifteplanene deres.

programme.title: The Hills: What Happens In Vegas...
programme.desc: Gjengen feirer Brodys bursdag i Vegas. Audrinas kjæreste Justin skaper problemer for hennes vennskap med Lauren. Lauren og Brodys tiltrekning til hverandre vokser.

programme.title: The Hills: What Goes Around
programme.desc: Jen Bunney forteller Lauren at Brody startet ryktene om henne, men Brody skylder på Spencer, og Heidi blir stående midt oppi det hele. Lauren ber Audrina om unnskyldning for å ha blandet seg i hennes og Justins forhold.

programme.title: The Hills: No More Mr. Nice Guy
programme.desc: Lauren begynner en ny romanse med en herremodell, men innser at hun fortsatt er glad i Brody. Spencer er redd for at Heidis nye jobb vil ta henne fra ham.

programme.title: The Hills: Stress And The City
programme.desc: Whitney og Lauren tar en tur til NYC for Teen Vogue, og Spencer henvender seg til Brody.

programme.title: The Hills: Young Hollywood
programme.desc: Whitney og Lauren er med i The Young Hollywood Party, og Heidi feirer sin 21-årsdag.

programme.title: The Hills: Forgive and Forget
programme.desc: Heidi og Lauren krangler nok en gang offentlig, noe som resulterer i at Heidi ber Lauren om unnskyldning for alt som har hendt. Audrinas forhold med Justin går ikke framover, men karrieren hennes hos Epic Records går så det suser.

programme.title: The Hills: With This Ring...
programme.desc: Lauren leker Kirsten Giftekniv når Whitney går på sin første date med sin personlige trener. Spencer er i mot Heidis planer om et eventyrbryllup, og det ender i en krangel som truer hele forholdet deres.

programme.title: The Hills: A Night At The Opera
programme.desc: Audrina tar Justin i å kysse en annen jente, og en endelig konfrontasjon rundt forholdet deres følger. Heidi sjokkeres av at Spencers søster starter en krangel med Lauren og Brody på en nattklubb.

programme.title: The Hills: Once a Player
programme.desc: Lauren mener at Brody er for mye av en playboy til at man bør ta ham alvorlig. Spencers søster forteller ham at Heidi i hemmelighet tviler på om de bør gifte seg.

programme.title: The Hills: When One Door Closes...
programme.desc: Lauren mottar noen spennende nyheter på Teen Vogue og Heidi trenger litt tid borte fra Spencer.

programme.title: The Hills: Paris Changes Everything
programme.desc: Lauren får endelig dra til Paris, men drømmeturen blir nesten ødelagt da hun finner ut at Brody har funnet seg en ny. Spencer følger etter Heidi til Colorado for å vinne henne tilbake, men planen hans slår feil.

programme.title: The Hills: Back to L.A.
programme.desc: Whitney må velge mellom tryggheten i Teen Vogue og risikoen ved å forfølge en ny karriere. Lauren og Brody krangler om hans nye kjæreste, og Heidi tilpasser seg livet uten Spencer.

programme.title: The Hills: An Unexpected Friend
programme.desc: Lauren får overraskende en venn når Spencers søster Stephanie blir med i hennes moteklasse. Whitney tror den nye jobben er drømmejobben, men en hektisk tur til New York minner henne på å være forsiktig med hva hun ønsker seg.

programme.title: The Hills: When Spencer Finds Out...
programme.desc: Lauren inviterer Stephanie i bursdagsselskapet sitt, men Heidi og Spencer sår tvil om Stephanies lojalitet. Spencer lanserer en plan for å vinne Heidi tilbake.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Cam You Feel the Love Tonight
programme.desc: Cameron blir fanget mellom eksen og den neste. Et par sliter med å bli enige om de er et par, eller ikke. En eks blir sendt hjem.
programme.sub-title: Cam You Feel the Love Tonight

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: This is Episode 5 But Let's Call It 6
programme.desc: Devin møter Maries sinne da han kaller henne 'a six'. Billy prøver seg på Lexi. En ny eks blir en spennende nestemann for en singel. En Crush Date blir belønnet.
programme.sub-title: This is Episode 5 But Let's Call It 6

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: The Mother of All Secrets
programme.desc: En ny eks og et besøk av mamma forrykker et spirende forhold. Marie kjemper med å være 'a six.' Singlene samler seg for å sende hjem et eks som hindrer en venn fra å finne sin neste.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Exes Haunt These Fields
programme.desc: En eks ankommer på den verste tiden for å fullstendig velte en nytent romanse mellom en singel og dennes eks. Mark setter krydder på tingene med Aubrey. Billy er helt på knærne etter Lexi. En Crush date blir belønnet.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Coffey Run
programme.desc: CAmeron stilles for retten for forbrytelser mot eksene sine. Mark og Aubrey må stride mot en uventet eks. En eks blir sendt hjem.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: I Want It That Way
programme.desc: Aubery prøver å både beholde kaken og spise den, når det gjelder hennes forhold til Mark og Coffey. Cameron kan ikke gi slipp på Ariana. Sirkuet er i byen og en crush-date blir belønnet.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Roses Are Red, Exes Make You Blue
programme.desc: Mechies nye romanse settes på prøve når en ny eks ankommer huset. Singlene får erfare at deres handlinger får konsekvenser i en overraskende kutt-seremoni. Et hemmelig forhold avsløres.
programme.sub-title: Roses Are Red, Exes Make You Blue

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Thruple Trouble
programme.desc: Aubrey og Marks forhold når et lavpunkt. Devins nye romanse gjør Marie fortumlet. Den endelige Crush Date blir belønnet og en uventet gjest avbryter tingene for et par.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Two for One Deal
programme.desc: Coffey befinner seg midt mellom Mark og Aubrey når de slår opp. Mechie slites mellom eksen og hans neste, noe som setter Ariana i helspenn. To ekser blir sendt hjem under Cut Ceremony.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Show Me the Receipts
programme.desc: Kjente og ukjente ansikt kommer tilbake for å skape røre i huset. En løgndetektortest tvinger visse singler til å ta hånd om rotet sitt.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: The Final Crush
programme.desc: Deltakerne må håndtere resultatene av løgndetektortestene sine. De må nå ta den ultimate avgjørelsen: Skal de dra hjem med ekskjæresten, den neste kjæresten eller alene?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Reunion
programme.desc: Singler og ekser gjenforenes for første gang siden den enedelige crush-seremonien. Ashley Iaconetti og Jared Haibon er programledere. Vi finner ut hvilke par som stadig er i hvetebrødsfasen, som har slått opp eller har glidd tilbake i eksens seng.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Body SOS: Paige & Sam
programme.desc: Paige vil ikke bestemme bryllupsdato før hun kvitter seg med noen kilo, og Sam vil bli veltrent for å kunne bli modell. Rekker de å forvandle seg før de må vise seg frem i Ex on the Beach?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Body SOS: Jourdan & Liam
programme.desc: Jourdan vil gå ned i vekt for å gjenoppdage Beyoncé-kurvene sine og Liam vil bli veltrent for å kunne bli skuespiller. Rekker de å forvandle seg før de skal vise seg fram i Ex on the Beach?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Body SOS: Deano & Paris
programme.desc: Deano er desperat etter å bli kvitt mannebrystene og bli like veltrent som kompisene, og kanskje få seg date. Paris øsker å temme kurvene og få tilbake selvtilliten. Men vil de klare forandringene før deres Ex on the Beach-avsløring?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Body SOS: Becci & Kieran
programme.desc: Becci er lei av å være den tjukke søsteren og vil gå ned i vekt. Kieran er lei av å være liten og vil legge på seg. Vil de klare endringene før de må vise frem alt i 'Ex on the Beach'-avsløringen?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Body SOS: Ronan & Camilla
programme.desc: Ronan har lagt på seg mange kilo og kommer seg ikke videre, mens Camilla vil komme i form til jenteferien hun skal på. Vil de klare å ta grep før deres Ex on the Beach-oppvisning?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Body SOS: Shelbie and Liv & Vanessa
programme.desc: Studentene Shelbie & Liv har lagt på seg masse og må slanke seg og trene. Vanessa drømmer om å ha en kvinnelig fribryter-kropp. Vil de klare å endre kroppene sine før de skal vise seg frem i 'Ex on the Beach'-avsløringen?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Body SOS: Sheena & Georgia
programme.desc: Sheena må ned i vekt før drømme-bryllupsreisen, og Georgia må slanke seg for å finne tilbake til sitt gamle jeg. Vil de klare å endre sine liv i tide til 'Ex on the Beach'-avsløringen?

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Dinner Dates With A Side Of Ex
programme.desc: De single kjendisene møtes til en fest ved bassenget og dykker ned i romansen. Men når Terrorpadden kunngjør at de skal ha middagsdater, blir de sjokkert da de får høre at de vil bli servert en eks den første kvelden.
programme.sub-title: Dinner Dates With A Side Of Ex

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Overraskelse
programme.desc: Det er alt eller intet for Finn og Paige Ashley tviler forholdet med Jarred under kjendisfesten på strandklubben, og da en stor overraskende kjendis ankommer føler Yaz seg tatt på senga.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1978 Cadillac Sedan DeVille
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen Niles Cadillac Sedan DeVille. Nile ruller hjem i en mørkerosa metallic bil med bagasjerommet fullt av nye sko.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1986 Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet Logans Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme. Logan ruller hjem med basketgulv og lakk i to farger.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1992 Honda Civic
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet Christines Honda Civic. Tre dager etter at avsnittet med Christine ble sendt, døde en nær slektning av magekreft.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1990 Mitsubishi Mirage
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Antwons Mitsubishi Mirage. Antwon ruller hjem på 18-tommersdekk og med et akvarium i baksetet.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1967 Ford Mustang
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper West Coast Customs Marys Ford Mustang. Bilen hennes utstyres med det aller nyeste innen flatskjerm-tv.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1985 Ford Ranger
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Jareds Ford Ranger. Jared ruller i vei tre tommer lavere, nylakkert i metallic oransje.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Pontiac Trans Am
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper West Coast Customs Danelles Pontiac Trans Am. Hun triller i vei i en bil utstyrt med kaffetrakter og krystallkrone.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1974 Chevy Luv
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Neils Chevrolet LUV Truck. Han triller av gårde i et campingtelt på hjul.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1989 Ford Mustang
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Shondas Ford Mustang Convertible. Hun ruller i vei i et pimpet og helt trafikksikkert kjøretøy.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Maxima Station Wagon
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Ezras Nissan Maxima Station Wagon. Han kjører av gårde i en mobil DJ-bås.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Volkswagen Baja
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Krissys Volkswagen Baja Bug. Boblen fra 1969 ble konstruert med holdbarhet som mål. Men med sitt bøyde eksosrør og sine ødelagte dører, kan den virkelig beskrives som alt annet enn akkurat det.

programme.title: iCarly: Dårlig stemning i butikken
programme.desc: Freddies nye drømmejobb i Pear Store blir et mareritt når Sam også blir ansatt. Imens prøver Carly å bli inviteret ut av en fra Pear Store, og Spencer må melde seg til frivillig jobb på den lokale brannstasjonen.

programme.title: iCarly: Halloween
programme.desc: iCarly-gjengen holder en "Halfoween"-fest, for de syns at det skal være Halloween to ganger i året. Men da en forkledd gjest spiller Carly og vennene et puss, blir festen litt for vill.

programme.title: iCarly: Chucks lillebror
programme.desc: Et sinna barn ønsker inderlig å hevne seg, men målskiven Spencer prøver iherdig å stoppe ham. Gibby blir knust når hans nye lekelaserpistol går i stykker, men blir fra seg av henrykkelse når Freddies reparsjion gir den overraskende krefter.

programme.title: iCarly: Utestengt
programme.desc: Når Carly bannlyser T-Bo fra hennes og Spencers hjem, hevner han seg ved å ikke slippe Carly inn på Groovy Smoothie. Imens oppdager Freddie og Gibby at det fins mange fordeler ved å spille i band...og også et par ulemper.

programme.title: iCarly: Turen til Las Vegas
programme.desc: Når Sam får vite at moren hennes er i fengsel i Vegas, bestemmer gjengen seg for å ta sine mest verdifulle eiendeler, kjøre til Vegas og pantsette dem - så de får nok penger til å betale borgen for henne. Gjesteartister: History Channels PAWN STARS.

programme.title: iCarly: Nattsynbrillene
programme.desc: Sams venn kommer ut av ungdomsfengselet, og Sam advarer alle om å holde seg unna, men Carly hører ikke etter og havner på dypt vann. Hjemme i leiligheten finner Spencer noen nattsynbriller.

programme.title: iCarly: Verden er rystet del 1
programme.desc: Jimmy Fallon inviterer iCarly-gjengen til å opptre live i programmet sitt i New York. De elsker New York og er kjempeglade for å være med i programmet, men alt kan skje på live tv.

programme.title: iCarly: Verden er rystet del 2
programme.desc: Jimmy Fallon inviterer iCarly-gjengen til å opptre live i programmet sitt i New York, men en stor klesmiss fra Gibby betyr store problemer for nettshowets fremtid.

programme.title: iCarly: Spencers venner
programme.desc: iCarly-gjengen vil finne venner til Spencer på hans egen alder. De finner noen gode muligheter, men vil vennskapet blomstre?

programme.title: iCarly: Den stjålne laptoppen
programme.desc: Når Sams laptop blir stjålet, prøver iCarly-gjengen å hjelpe henne med å oppspore tyven. Imens får Spencer vite at han ikke får komme inn i sin yndlingsspillehall hvis han ikke er i følge med et barn. Hellet snur når Guppy trenger barnevakt.

programme.title: iCarly: Farvel del 2
programme.desc: Carly er på vei til å akseptere at hun ikke kan gå på det årlige ballet, da faren hennes dukker opp og går sammen med henne. Kvelden tar en uventet vending når faren hennes stiller et livsavgjørende spørsmål.

programme.title: iCarly: Vårt eget webshow
programme.desc: Når Miss Briggs avviser alle yndlingsdeltagerne deres fra uttakene til talenshowet, bestemmer Carly og Sam seg for å lage sitt eget talentshow for klassekameratene gjennom iCarly på nettet.

programme.title: iCarly: Herr Nesten Perfekt
programme.desc: Carly er keen på en gutt på skolen som heter Jake. Han er råkul og kjekk, og fordi hun liker ham, inviterer hun Jake til å spille gitar og synge på sitt nye webshow. Men hun oppdager forsent at Jake synger helt forferdelig.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg vil ha flere seere
programme.desc: Carly og Sam konkurrerer med Freddie og Spencer om å finne den beste planen for hvordan å få flere ungdommer til å se på iCarlys websendinger. Når alle planene deres slår helt feil, blir alt helt sprøtt.

programme.title: iCarly: En pågående kritiker
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie vil at web-showet deres skal bli anmeldt av 'Nevelocity', en populær webside for slike anmeldelser. Carly drar for å møte Nevel, og det viser seg at han er en irriterende gutt som vil date henne.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg vil bli hos Spencer
programme.desc: Bestefaren til Carly og Spencer kommer på overraskelsesvisitt. Han tror at Spencer er for uansvarlig til å passe på Carly. Carly og vennene hennes må bevise overfor bestefaren at Spencer er i stand til det.

programme.title: iCarly: Rekordforsøket
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie prøver å slå verdensrekorden for den lengste sammenhengende nettvideovisningen. For å klare det, må iCarly gå i over 24 timer i ett kjør.

programme.title: iCarly: En date med Freddie
programme.desc: Valerie er iCarly-fan og ber Freddie på date. Daten går så bra at Freddie begynner å filme Valeries eget webshow. Men når hennes webshow kommer i veien for iCarly, får Freddie problemer.

programme.title: iCarly: En lidenskapelig amatør
programme.desc: Carly inviterer Spencers kunsthelt, Harry Joyner, for å se på Spencers arbeid. Når Harry kaller Spensers ting amatørmessige, føler Spencer at livet har mistet all mening.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarlys største fan
programme.desc: iCarlys største fan, Mandy, blir invitert til showet som enslig studiopuplikum. Mandy viser seg å være mer av en forfølger enn et fan, og de blir nødt til å kvitte seg med henne.

programme.title: iCarly: Kyllinger på rømmen
programme.desc: Carly og Sam starter med å klekke ut kyllinger for et naturfagprosjekt. Kyllingene klekkes tidligere enn ventet og rømmer fra inkubatoren. Nå må Carly, Sam, Freddie og Spencer finne alle kyllingene rundt om i leiligheten.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg vil ikke krangle
programme.desc: Carly makes Sam en unik iCarly T-skjorte for å markere årsdagen for vennskapet deres. Men når Sam bytter den bort mot konsertbiletter, havner de to vennene i klammeri.

programme.title: iCarly: Dansende drømmer
programme.desc: iCarly ber fansen om å sende inn videoer av dem selv når de danser sine kuleste danser. Over tre tusen danseklipp kommer inn, og Carly, Sam og Freddie prøver å holde seg oppe hele natten for å se på alle videoene.

programme.title: iCarly: Det spøker på Halloween
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie sender iCarly fra en leilighet som det sies at det spøker i. Når det begynner å skje nifse ting, begynner også vennene å bli redde for at spøkelsesryktene er sanne.

programme.title: iCarly: En dag jeg vil angre
programme.desc: Spencer redder livet til hovedsangeren i The Plain White T's og får ham til å gå med på å delta i iCarly. Merkelige ting begynner å gå feil midt i Carlys, Sams og Freddies nettvideosending.

programme.title: iCarly: Gjensittingen
programme.desc: Sam må sitte igjen den kvelden iCarly holder sin 50. nettvideospesialsending. Carly og Freddie kan da altså ikke gjøre som de pleier, så de prøver så godt de kan å få gjennsitting de også, så de kan sende fra skolebenken med Sam.

programme.title: iCarly: Fotsår reklame
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie blir invitert til Dakas hovedkvarter, der de blir tilbudt en stor pengesum får å gå god for Dakas nye sko, Tech-foten, på iCarly. Men det viser seg at skoene er forferdelige.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg lover å ikke sladre
programme.desc: Carly får en B på historieprøven hun burde ha fått en A på. Sam, som griper sjansen på sitt ukentlige møte med rektor Franklin, forandrer Carlys karakter på datamaskinen og overrasker henne med A blank.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarly redder TV
programme.desc: En prestisjetung produsent vil gjøre iCarly om til et TV-show. Men Carly, Sam og Freddie blir raskt fortvilet når de hører om alle de store forandringene produsenten ønsker å foreta.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg hater Sams kjæreste
programme.desc: Sam får en kjæreste og de to blir uadskillelige. Men når forholdet begynner å få følger for iCarly, forstår Carly og Freddie at de må gjøre noe.

programme.title: iCarly: Overvåket
programme.desc: Etter å ha sett et klipp på iCarly der en mann selger illegale piratkopivideoer, bestemmer to detektiver seg for å bruke Carly og Spencers loft for overvåking.

programme.title: iCarly: Skolebytte
programme.desc: Carly får vite at hun får mulighet til å få et fullt stipend til en privat eliteskole pga nettshowet sitt. Skolen er Briarwood. Carly er i sterk tvil, men Sam og Freddie vet de må få henne til å gå for det.

programme.title: iCarly: Fektedrama
programme.desc: Freddie trenger litt guttetid, så han slår seg sammen med Spencer for å dra og fekte. Freddie er et naturtalent, men ting blir innviklet når Spencer får ham med i en kamp mot den utrolige Doug Toder.

programme.title: iCarly: Vinn en date
programme.desc: Når vennen deres Gibby er for sjenert for å be ut jenta han liker, bestemmer gjengen seg for å gjøre ham og hans flamme til deltagere i et "iWin A Date" innslag på nettvideoshowet deres

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg så han først
programme.desc: Når Carly og Sam viser interesse for den samme fyren, lover de at han ikke skal komme imellom dem. Men det er vanskelig, og når de slåss om hans oppmerksomhet, blir vennskapet deres satt på prøve.

programme.title: iCarly: Pack rat
programme.desc: Carly må trå til når Spencer blir avhengig av et videospil. Sam lurer Freddie til å tro at han blir forfulgt av uhell når han nekter å sende et kjedebrev videre.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg skylder deg en
programme.desc: Sam blir fornærmet når Freddie beskylder henne for ikke å betale ham og Carly noen av de pengene tilbake som hun konstant låner. Sam prøver iherdig å betale dem tilbake - hun finner seg en ordentlig jobb.

programme.title: iCarly: Hubert Lewbert
programme.desc: En "Lur Lewbert"-sketsj går helt galt og skader Carlys irriterende portvakt. Gjengen pleier ham inntil Freddies mor tar over. Men når kærligheten begynner å blomstre, må de sette en stopper for det.

programme.title: iCarly: Pie
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Spencer tar med Freddie til deres yndlingskonditori, finner de ut at eieren er død. Men enda verre er det at oppskriftene hans kanskje er gått tapt for alltid.

programme.title: iCarly: Jul
programme.desc: I et forsøk på å pifte opp julen med et utradisjonelt tre, kommer Spencer til å sette fyr på alle Carlys gaver. Fortvilet ønsker hun seg at hun hadde en normal bror.

programme.title: Totally Turtles
programme.desc: Cowabunga! Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles kommer rett fra kloakken og er klare til å kjempe mot både fremmede og mutante fiender. Ta en pizza og gjør deg klar for maksimal Turtle Power!
