programme.desc: Evig uskyldige Butters er lei behandlingen han får av foreldrene, og blir litt for oppslukt av den nye vampyrfeberen.

programme.title: South Park: Døde kjendiser
programme.desc: Michael Jacksons spøkelse nekter å akseptere å måtte vandre heden og etterlater resten av de nylig avdøde berømtheter frustrert i Skjærsilden.

programme.title: South Park: Zimmermans verdenskrig
programme.desc: Cartman anser Token for å være en trussel mot hele menneskeheten.

programme.title: South Park: Mecha Streisand
programme.desc: Cartman og Kyle krangler om et magisk triangel som kan forvandle Barbra Streisand til et fryktelig monster.

programme.title: South Park: Regnskog sjmegnskog
programme.desc: Guttene sendes til regnskogen i Costa Rica med et kor.

programme.title: South Park: Glødhet katolsk kjærlighet
programme.desc: Presten Maxi reiser til Roma da skandalen i den katolske kirken truer med å påvirke antallet kirkegjengere i South Park negativt.

programme.title: South Park: Pandemien
programme.desc: South Park tar en 'Cloverfield' med store, mystiske skapninger som herjer rundt i verden og blir fanget opp av Randys kamera.

programme.title: South Park: Pandemien 2: Alarmerende
programme.desc: Enorme marsvin angriper byer i hele verden. Guttene har nøkkelen til å redde menneskeheten, men sitter fast i Andesfjellene.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Shades of Grey
programme.desc: Mouse makes his first appearance - and is quickly shunned by the Family of tunnel folk for thievery.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: China Moon
programme.desc: Vincent and Catherine help a Chinatown beauty avoid an arranged marriage by escaping into the underground.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Alchemist
programme.desc: Catherine has reason to believe that a new drug on the streets is being supplied by someone from Vincent's world.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Temptation
programme.desc: A beautiful attorney seduces Catherine's boss, Joe Maxwell, creating a serious conflict of interest.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Promises of Someday
programme.desc: Catherine is disturbed when she begins to suspect the new attorney in her office is a fraud... and more disturbed when she finds him looking for the entrance to Vincent's world.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Down to a Sunless Sea
programme.desc: Catherine fails to heed Vincent's warnings about her dangerous former law-school beau.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Fever
programme.desc: After Mouse discovers a ship's gold and gemstones treasure buried beneath the city, Vincent's community is torn apart by greed and strife.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Everything is Everything
programme.desc: A Romani boy clears his father's name and regains the love and trust of his grandparents with Vincent and Catherine's help.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: To Reign in Hell
programme.desc: Vincent prepares for a battle to the death after Catherine is kidnapped by a giant warrior.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Ozymandias
programme.desc: Vincent's world Below is threatened by a massive tower being built by Elliot Burch, a former suitor of Catherine's. She agrees to marry Burch on the condition that he halt construction.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Happy Life
programme.desc: Catherine and Vincent are forced to question if they could ever be truly happy together.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Chamber Music
programme.desc: While walking in the world Above, Vincent recognizes Rolly,a teenage musical prodigy and ex-tunnel dweller who is now a junkie.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Remember Love
programme.desc: In a moment of profound despair, Vincent undergoes his own It's a Wonderful Life (1946) experience and sees what would have happened if he had died as a baby.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Ashes, Ashes
programme.desc: A Russian sailor escapes to the tunnels only to bring a plague upon the people in the Underworld. It is up to Catherine, Vincent, Father, and everybody to help save their world.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Dead of Winter
programme.desc: When the tunnel world is having an annual event, Paracelcus makes plans to crash the event and do something.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: God Bless the Child
programme.desc: With Catherine's help, a pregnant teenage hooker is welcomed into the tunnels. Complications arise when she falls in love with Vincent.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Sticks and Stones
programme.desc: A deaf girl, who used to live below, falls in with a street gang that threatens to put an end to her first serious love affair.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Man in the Bottle
programme.desc: A luckless couple stumbles upon fortune when a genie materializes from a bottle in their antique shop. The genie grants them four wishes but warns them, prophetically, to be careful what you wish for.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Nervous Man in a Four Dollar Room
programme.desc: Small time criminal Jackie Rhoades must face both his past and his conscience while waiting for his next assignment.
programme.sub-title: Nervous Man in a Four Dollar Room

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Thing About Machines
programme.desc: Bartlett Finchley's paranoia about the machines around proves true.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Take My Life... Please!/Devil's Alphabet/The Library
programme.desc: A comedian killed by his rival finds himself in a strange stage show; something's off/In Victorian England, Cambridge grads are bound by an oath even in death/A woman starts at an odd library.
programme.sub-title: Take My Life... Please!/Devil's Alphabet/The Library

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Shadow Play/Grace Note
programme.desc: A condemned man, Adam Grant, insists that everything and everyone around him is a dream: one that he can't wake up from/An aspiring opera singer gets an inspiring glimpse of her future, courtesy of a dying wish by her youngest sister.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Howling Man
programme.desc: Seeking refuge from a storm, traveler David Ellington comes upon a bizarre hermitage of monks, who have imprisoned a man who begs for his help. When David confronts the head monk Brother Jerome, he is told that the man is the devil, and David must decide

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Eye of the Beholder
programme.desc: A young woman lying in a hospital bed, her head wrapped in bandages, awaits the outcome of a surgical procedure performed by the State in a last-ditch attempt to make her look 'normal'.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Nick of Time
programme.desc: A pair of newlyweds stopping in a small town are trapped by their own superstition when playing a fortune-telling machine in a local diner.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Lateness of the Hour
programme.desc: The daughter of an inventor objects to their 'perfect' home where they are waited on by mechanical servants.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A day in Beaumont/The Last Defender of Camelot
programme.desc: In the 1950s a flying saucer crashes on Earth. The crash is seen by a couple but no one believes them/Sir Lancelot seeks the help of the sleeping Merlin in one final battle. But he soon finds himself facing off against the revived wizard.
programme.sub-title: A day in Beaumont/The Last Defender of Camelot

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: After Hours/Lost and Found
programme.desc: Marsha Cole detects shadowy figures and mysterious voices around her during a trip to a local shopping mall/College student Jennifer Templeton finds out why her possessions have been vanishing.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Saucer of Loneliness
programme.desc: A quiet waitress sees a glowing UFO, which gives her a message that everyone wants to know. She refuses to reveal exactly what the message is.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Trouble with Templeton
programme.desc: A nostalgic actor revisits his late wife and friends at their old haunt, only to find that he is now out of place there.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Most Unusual Camera
programme.desc: When three dum-dum crooks get ahold of a camera that takes pictures of the future, they set out to make a quick fortune with their new toy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Night of the Meek
programme.desc: After a derelict Santa Claus is fired on Christmas Eve, he finds a mysterious bag that gives out presents. With this bag, he sets out to fulfill his one wish - to see the less fortunate inherit the bounties of Christmas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Dust
programme.desc: In a tragic, western town, a desperate father begs for clemency as his son is slated to die for an accident he could not have prevented.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: What Are Friends For?
programme.desc: A friendless boy finds the perfect playmate in the woods behind his house.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Aqua Vita
programme.desc: Aging women become addicted to Aqua Vita, which will keep them young forever, but at great cost.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Storyteller
programme.desc: In the early 20th century a young woman takes a job as a teacher in a one-room schoolhouse. One of her students, Mica, secretly takes extra books home to read.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Toys of Caliban
programme.desc: An elderly couple keeps their mentally disabled son isolated because he can "bring" anything he sees in a picture.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Back There
programme.desc: At a prominent club in Washington, D.C., a socialite argues about whether it would be possible to change history by traveling back in time. When he leaves the club he finds himself in 1865, on the night that President Lincoln will be shot.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Whole Truth
programme.desc: A used car salesman buys a car that dooms him to tell only the truth.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Invaders
programme.desc: When a woman investigates a clamor on the roof of her rural house, she discovers a small UFO and little aliens emerging from it. Or so it seems.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Penny For Your Thoughts
programme.desc: Gaining telepathic abilities when his coin lands on its edge bank clerk Hector B. Poole learns about the difference between other people's plans and fantasies.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: A man who dodged the Vietnam draft sees how life would have been like if he hadn't

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Card
programme.desc: A compulsive spender accepts "The Card" to keep up her habit. Unfortunately stringent penalties kick in for late payments.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Shelter Skelter
programme.desc: A survivalist traps himself in his bomb shelter when a nuclear blast finally comes.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Junction
programme.desc: A modern-day miner has an argument with his wife and then goes off to work in the local mine. A collapse traps him, but he finds another survivor - a miner who claims to be from 1912.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Twenty-Two
programme.desc: While in the hospital recovering from overwork, Liz Powell keeps dreaming about going down to the hospital morgue.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Odyssey of Flight 33
programme.desc: Passing through the sound barrier a commercial airliner inadvertently travels back in time.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Aging Not So Gracefully
programme.desc: Sabrina goes a little overboard in her attempt to seem more mature for the attentions of a college boy.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Love Means Having To Say You’re Sorry
programme.desc: Paying the price for kissing Josh, Sabrina must adjust to life after Harvey.
programme.sub-title: Love Means Having To Say You’re Sorry

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Ice Station Sabrina
programme.desc: A life-threatening situation forces Sabrina to risk exposing her magic to a witch hunter.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Salem And Juliette
programme.desc: Sabrina helps Salem find a date for his high school reunion.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina Nipping At Your Nose
programme.desc: When the weather outside turns frightful, the Spellman’s plan a trip to Jamaica.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Now You See Her Now You Don’t
programme.desc: Adhering to a fad diet from the Other Realm, Sabrina becomes so thin she literally disappears.
programme.sub-title: Now You See Her Now You Don’t

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Super Hero
programme.desc: Childhood dreams come true when Sabrina casts a spell that turns Harvey into a superhero.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Love In Bloom
programme.desc: Valentine’s Day gets complicated when Sabrina learns two boys are vying for her heart.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Welcome Back Duke
programme.desc: Sabrina discovers why the road to ruin is paved with good intentions.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Salem’s Daughter
programme.desc: As maid of honor, Sabrina pays the price for reuniting Salem with his daughter in time for her wedding.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Dreama, The Mouse
programme.desc: Brad’s witch hunting gene goes into overdrive when Sabrina comes down with Spring Fever.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Wild Wild Witch
programme.desc: The West gets even wilder when Sabrina takes the reins as town sheriff.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: She’s Baaack!
programme.desc: Cousin Amanda returns to give Sabrina a little competition in the teenage witch -and love-- department.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Four Faces Of Sabrina
programme.desc: Choosing a college literally tears Sabrina apart when she tries too hard to make everyone happy.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The End Of An Era (Season Finale)
programme.desc: After four years of enduring Sabrina’s spells and strange behavior, Harvey finally suspects she is a witch
programme.sub-title: The End Of An Era (Season Finale)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Every Witch Way but Loose
programme.desc: After spending the summer trying to get over her first love, Sabrina decides to make some changes in her life, including attending college and living away from home like a normal freshman.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Double Time
programme.desc: In order to keep up with the overwhelming academic and social demands of college life, Sabrina puts herself under a complicated time spell to move at lightning speed, but she later discovers that the extra time got sucked away from her roommates.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Heart of the Matter
programme.desc: When Sabrina realizes she has been turning down guys right and left since her break up with Harvey, she casts a spell to turn herself into a dating machine.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: You Can’t Twin
programme.desc: On a visit to the Other Realm, Sabrina meets up with her evil twin Katrina who steals her passport and returns to mortal life posing as Sabrina.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: House of PI’s
programme.desc: Sabrina and Roxie are unexpectedly paired together to write a story in an effort to land a coveted spot on the school newspaper.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Halloween Scene
programme.desc: When Sabrina can’t find anyone to share her enthusiasm for Halloween she decides to throw her own haunted holiday bash and it turns into the party of the year.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Welcome Traveler
programme.desc: When Sabrina tries to pull Miles away from his latest conspiracy theory and into some semblance of a social life, she unknowingly pushes him right into the hands of a cult whose eccentric leader claims to be a witch.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Some of My Best Friends are Half-Mortals
programme.desc: Tired of hiding her true identity when dating mortal guys, Sabrina agrees to be fixed up by Zelda with a handsome and charming witch, Derek. The budding romance is dashed when she encounters racism over the fact that she is half-mortal.
programme.sub-title: Some of My Best Friends are Half-Mortals

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Lost @ C
programme.desc: Sabrina is distraught when she receives her first “C” ever on a class assignment and turns to Zelda for counseling. Zelda ends up conducting her own private tutoring session with Sabrina’s handsome professor.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s Perfect Christmas
programme.desc: Sabrina opts to spend a picture-perfect Christmas with Morgan and her family rather than endure the annual insanity with Hilda and Zelda. She soon discovers the ugly secrets under the flawless façade.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: My Best Shot
programme.desc: Sabrina tries to give Josh a little confidence booster in his new passion to be a photographer, but her simple spell to help him make his first sale leads to his getting a big head and walking out on his job at the coffeehouse.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Tick-Tock Hilda’s Clock
programme.desc: When Sabrina throws Hilda a surprise party for her 650th birthday, Hilda becomes depressed that she doesn’t have a husband or family yet. Things go from bad to worse when Sabrina loses the out-of-whack biological clock.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s New Roommate
programme.desc: When Sabrina reluctantly takes in Zelda for a few days while Hilda’s on a home remodeling binge, Sabrina and her roommates try to loosen up her uptight Aunt Zelda.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Making the Grade
programme.desc: Sabrina tries to right a wrong when she writes an article for the school paper exposing the preferential treatment given to school athletes, but she inadvertently puts Roxie's scholarship in jeopardy.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Love is a Many Complicated Thing
programme.desc: Sabrina agrees to a double date on Valentine's Day with Josh and Morgan, but by the end of the date she finds herself in the middle of her friends' break up.
programme.sub-title: Love is a Many Complicated Thing

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina the Muse
programme.desc: Sabrina is flattered when her new boyfriend writes music about his feelings for her, but the pressure to inspire him as his muse becomes a one-sided relationship.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Beach Blanket Bizarro
programme.desc: Sabrina’s wild visions of her first college spring break turn squeaky-clean when her aunts ask 60’s teen idol Frankie Avalon to put a spell on the trip. This sends Sabrina and her friends into a world straight out of a 60’s beach movie.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Witchright Hall
programme.desc: When Sabrina’s trouble-making teenage cousin Amanda is sent to live with Hilda and Zelda, they count on Sabrina to convince the headmaster and school director of Witchright Hall to accept Amanda.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina the Activist
programme.desc: Sabrina, who is now in low spirits over her heavy course load and recent break up, decides to put her energy into something positive: leading a protest to save an historical building from demolition.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Do You See What I See?
programme.desc: Sabrina feels responsible when Miles considers giving up his paranormal research to settle in his father’s accounting business after no one believes the otherworldly phenomena he sees at the Spellman home.
programme.sub-title: Do You See What I See?

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s Got Spirit
programme.desc: Sabrina tries to throw off Miles and the specialist he has hired to uncover paranormal activity in the house, but Sabrina herself discovers a ghost in the ceiling.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Finally!
programme.desc: Romance brews between Sabrina and Josh when they turn the coffeehouse into a single's night featuring entertainment by the band Eden's Crush.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Really Big Season Opener
programme.desc: Miles decides to make a student film in his favorite genre, horror, and enlists Sabrina as the producer of his film.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Fabric Smarts
programme.desc: Mallory's enthusiasm for her part-time job at a boutique causes her grades to slip even lower than usual.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Lost Weekend
programme.desc: Steven and Elyse plan a nostalgic weekend with the kids before the baby arrives, and are crushed to discover that the children are not at all interested in reminiscing about old times-they'd rather be with their friends.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Little Man on Campus
programme.desc: Alex is thrilled to be taking a college course taught by one of his personal heroes, Professor Ephraim Bronski. In his eagerness to impress the teacher he gets off to a bad start and is humiliated by his idol when he fails the first-class assignment.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Best Man
programme.desc: Alex cannot accept the fact that he and everyone around him are growing up and desperately clings to his old ways.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Keaton and Son
programme.desc: Alex reluctantly accepts a part-time job with his father at the non-profit station, and his dad is bursting with pride to have him following in his footsteps.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Don't Kiss Me, I'm Only The Messenger
programme.desc: Alex plays Cupid to help his shy pal Skippy get together with Jane, the girl of his dreams, but his good intentions go awry when the girl falls for him instead.
programme.sub-title: Don't Kiss Me, I'm Only The Messenger

programme.title: Fem i familien: Love Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Little Jennifer is thrilled about getting a visit from her former neighborhood pal, Scott, whom she hasn't seen in five years.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Hotline Fever
programme.desc: As an economics student, Alex finds it demeaning to be forced into a public service position, but his experiences at the crisis center give him a new outlook on life.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Help Wanted
programme.desc: Steven gets depressed from interviewing frightfully inept candidates as housekeeper-nanny for the baby, such as a child-hater ad an ex-con.

programme.title: Fem i familien: 4 RMS OCN VU
programme.desc: While Steven and Elyse are away on vacation, Mallory accidentally crashes her parents' car into a telephone pole. The kids need to raise money for auto repairs and decides to turn the Keaton house into a hotel.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Karen 11, Alex 0
programme.desc: Alex's chances for acceptance into a smug college fraternity are dependent upon him having a knockout date for the pledge dance.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Auntie Up
programme.desc: Mallory is crushed when her favorite aunt dies suddenly, but her feelings of sadness turn to anger when family and friends at the funeral seem to be taking Aunt Trudy's death too lightly.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Oh Donna
programme.desc: Alex befriends Donna, a young, unwed expectant mother from Elyse's natural-childbirth class.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Philadelphia Story
programme.desc: Alex falls asleep while working on a college term paper on Thomas Jefferson and dreams that his family and friends are living 200 years ago.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Birth Of A Keaton, Part One
programme.desc: To help Steven during pledge week at the television station, the Keatons reluctantly agree to be part of the entertainment. The audience gets an unexpected show when Elyse goes into labor right on camera while in the middle of a song.
programme.sub-title: Birth Of A Keaton, Part One

programme.title: Fem i familien: Birth of a Keaton, Part 2
programme.desc: A snowstorm prevents Elyse from getting to the hospital in time to deliver her baby.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Cry Baby
programme.desc: Jennifer is jealous of the attention paid to Andrew.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Don't Know Much About History...
programme.desc: Alex and his good friend James go into business together as tutors for their fellow students at Leland.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Cold Storage
programme.desc: With the rest of the Keaton family away for the weekend, Mallory is excited about having the house to herself until she is accidentally locked in the basement with the person she'd least like to be with--her adoring neighbor, Skippy.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Bringing Up Baby
programme.desc: With Elyse back at work, Steven is frustrated when her schedule and the baby's schedule aren't allowing them any free time together.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Remembrance of Things Past: Part 1
programme.desc: Steven takes a nostalgic trip to his hometown following the death of his father. With the support of Elyse and the children, he tries to prepare his mother for her new life (Part 1 of 2)

programme.title: Fem i familien: Remembrance of Things Past: Part 2
programme.desc: Steven takes a nostalgic trip to his hometown following the death of his father. With the support of Elyse and the children, he tries to prepare his mother for her new life. (Part 2 of 2)

programme.title: Fem i familien: Designated Hitter
programme.desc: Jennifer has a boyfriend and feels a bit self-conscious. When the boyfriend is teased at school by a bully, Jennifer steps in to defend him

programme.title: Fem i familien: Return Of The Native
programme.desc: Cousin June visits the Keatons, on holiday from her university studies in London. Memories bubble up when she starts talking about dating boys and a trip to Florence, most embarrassing moments for Keatons.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Matchmaker
programme.desc: Seeing that Mallory is a wreck after her break-up with Rick and six failed dates, Alex decides to match her with a fellow Leland student.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Mr. Wrong
programme.desc: The Keatons are shocked by Mallory’s new, gruff boyfriend, Nick.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Real Thing: Part 1
programme.desc: Alex picks out his dream girl from the school directory and falls for her roommate.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Real Thing: Part 2
programme.desc: Alex takes drastic measures to stop Ellen from getting married.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Old College Try
programme.desc: Mallory announces that she doesn’t want to go to college.

programme.title: Fem i familien: It's My Party: Part 1
programme.desc: Jennifer feels out of place at her own thirteenth birthday Party.

programme.title: Fem i familien: It's My Party: Part 2
programme.desc: Jennifer feels out of place at her own thirteenth birthday Party.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Don't Go Changing
programme.desc: Alex tries to change himself to fit in with Ellen’s world of artsy friends.

programme.title: Fem i familien: My Tutor
programme.desc: A young genius falls for Jennifer while tutoring Alex in math.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Three Navy lieutenants die by homicide in 11 months around Washington. Harm and Meg investigate

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Due to a human error in an exercise, artillery fire injures seven Marines, one of whom later dies.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: A sailor has stolen two Stinger missiles from a base. Harm and Meg investigate.

programme.title: JAG: Pilot Error
programme.desc: Two Naval aviators die in a crash of an F-14 while using a new fly-by-wire navigation system.

programme.title: JAG: War Cries
programme.desc: In Lima, Peru, while a boy sneaks into the US embassy at night, a Marine guard stops him.

programme.title: JAG: Sightings
programme.desc: In south Texas, residents have reported strange phenomena, stories of supernatural events have abounded, and a 10-year-old girl has disappeared.

programme.title: JAG: Scimitar
programme.desc: Two Marines in a Humvee mistakenly drive into Iraq; an Iraqi detail intercepts them, kills one, and captures the other.

programme.title: JAG: Defensive Action
programme.desc: A patrolling F-14 malfunctions in a no-fly zone; the crew ejects, and the bird explodes.

programme.title: JAG: Boot
programme.desc: A woman Marine recruit dies at Parris Island. Harm investigates while Meg poses undercover as a recruit.

programme.title: JAG: The Brotherhood
programme.desc: During a landing exercise Marines find a beaten, comatose fellow Marine on the beach

programme.title: JAG: Hemlock
programme.desc: By mistake a foreign agent sends a fax to Meg's office; then he retrieves it and shoots Meg to prevent her from identifying him

programme.title: JAG: High Ground
programme.desc: A Marine sniper receives orders contrary to a previous deal; his CO refuses to listen; the sniper takes a shot at the CO's Humvee.

programme.title: JAG: Smoked
programme.desc: After a lightning strike, an F-14 wanders into Cuban airspace, and Cuban fighters force it to land

programme.title: JAG: Black Ops
programme.desc: A Naval aviator, while temporarily assigned to a SEAL team, drowns at sea; he was the son of a woman senator.

programme.title: JAG: Survivors
programme.desc: In a civilian court Harm represents a divorced (and emotionally baffled) Marine colonel, who has gotten into trouble over an unauthorized visit with his minor son.

programme.title: JAG: Recovery
programme.desc: A Navy astronaut dies during a drill while preparing for a space mission to repair a satellite

programme.title: JAG: Prisoner
programme.desc: Chicom agents capture Harm in Hong Kong; they vigorously question him in mainland China about official matters.

programme.title: The Love Boat: How Do I Love Thee...?/ No More Alimony/ Authoress! Authoress!
programme.desc: Isaac's budding relationship with a new crew member becomes complicated when Gopher tells him to fire her. Meanwhile, a congressman and his wife bring their daughter aboard the Pacific Princess after receiving letters threatening her young life.
programme.sub-title: How Do I Love Thee...?/ No More Alimony/ Authoress! Authoress!

programme.title: The Love Boat: Best Ex-Friends/ All The Congressman's Women/ Three Faces Of Love
programme.desc: A gambling cruise for charity proves a chancy thing for a teacher (McLean Stevenson), two honeymooners (Shea Farrell, Leah Ayres), and the drive chairwoman (Celeste Holm). Richard Jaeckel, Antony Ponzini, Jo Ann Pflug, Gavin MacLeod.
programme.sub-title: Best Ex-Friends/ All The Congressman's Women/ Three Faces Of Love

programme.sub-title: Ace In The Hole/ Uncle Joey's Song/ Father In The Cradle

programme.sub-title: A Rose Is Not A Rose / Novelties / Too Rich And Too Thin

programme.title: The Love Boat: Side By Side/ A Fish Out Of Water/ Rub Me Tender
programme.desc: A boy who thinks his grandmother (Glynis Johns) is terminally ill will do anything to ensure her happiness; a man (Ed Begley Jr.) who's uncomfortable around women falls in love with a mermaid (Mary Crosby).
programme.sub-title: Side By Side/ A Fish Out Of Water/ Rub Me Tender

programme.title: The Love Boat: Copenhagen/Amsterdam Cruise/ Vicki and the Fugitive - Part 2
programme.desc: Mystery abounds when a woman becomes friendly with a man she knew in a past life but he doesn't remember her. At the same time, Captain Stubing pursues a beautiful passenger who seems intent on avoiding him.
programme.sub-title: Copenhagen/Amsterdam Cruise/ Vicki and the Fugitive - Part 2

programme.desc: Isaac tries to help a recently widowed woman and her son cope with their grief and a sightless woman believes she has found her former love.
programme.sub-title: Only The Good Die Young/ Honey Beats The Odds/ The Light Of Another Day

programme.title: The Love Boat: Soap Gets In Your Eyes/ A Match Made In Heaven/ Tugs Of The Heart

programme.sub-title: Aerobic April/ The Wager/ Story Of The Century

programme.desc: Doc's plans for romance with a beautiful woman are ruined by his ex-wife's fiance and Judy's newly divorced friend shares a secret.
programme.sub-title: The Last Heist/ Starting Over/ Watching The Master

programme.title: The Love Boat: By Hook Or By Crook/ Revenge With The Proper Stranger/ Don't Get Mad, Get Even

programme.sub-title: By Hook Or By Crook/ Revenge With The Proper Stranger/ Don't Get Mad, Get Even

programme.title: The Love Boat: London-Paris Cruise/ My Mother, My Chaperone/The Present/The Death and Life of Sir Alfred Demerest - Part 1

programme.title: The Love Boat: London-Paris Cruise/ My Mother, My Chaperone/The Present/The Death and Life of Sir Alfred Demerest - Part 2

programme.title: Happy Days: Get A Job
programme.desc: It's a new experience for Richie when he becomes romantically attracted to an "older woman."

programme.title: Happy Days: Cruisin'
programme.desc: Richie, Potsie, and Ralph Malph visit another part of town to meet some girls and find themselves in trouble when the girls' boyfriends show up. Fonzie steps in to save the day.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fearless Fonzarelli Part I
programme.desc: For a television show, the Fonz sets a record by jumping his motorcycle over fourteen garbage cans. He ends up crashing into Arnold's chicken stand, and while recuperating from a broken leg, upsets the regimen of the Cunningham household.

programme.title: Happy Days: Football Frolics
programme.desc: To raise money for the big football game, the boys decide to start their own babysitting service. In Football Frolics, Richie, Potsie and Ralph have their hopes set on seeing the big football game of the year, but tickets can't be found anywhere.

programme.title: Happy Days: Two Angry Men
programme.desc: When Fonzie sets a pigeon coop atop the Cunningham garage and the roof caves, Mr. Cunningham sues to collect damages. In Two Angry Men, Laverne and Shirley prevail upon Fonzie to care for a coop of pigeons.

programme.title: Happy Days: Sight for Sore Eyes
programme.desc: After reading too many foreign car manuals, Fonzie is plagued with headaches and is forced to wear glasses for a few weeks, but fears glasses aren't cool.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie Loves Pinky Part II
programme.desc: The Malachi brothers sabotage Pinky's car the night before the demolition derby.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Physical
programme.desc: A short-tempered sergeant loses his tenuous grasp on discipline when the Fonz reports to the army recruitment center soon after draftees Richie, Ralph and Potsie check in for physicals.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Apartment
programme.desc: Personality quirks begin to fray nerves after best friends Richie, Ralph, and Potsie rent an apartment together.

programme.title: Happy Days: Hard Cover
programme.desc: Richie and Fonzie must think fast to outwit a tough housemother after they're caught past curfew in the college girls' dormitory.

programme.title: Happy Days: Hollywood Part 2
programme.desc: Soon after getting the bad news that the studio deemed his James Dean impression obsolete, and gave Richie's wholesome good looks a contract instead, the Fonz finds a bigger fish to fry.

programme.title: Happy Days: Hollywood Part 3
programme.desc: Richie must choose either a 5-year Hollywood contract or college in Milwaukee while the Fonz accepts the California Kid's challenge to perform a dangerous water ski jump...over a shark!

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonsilectomy
programme.desc: Forced to spend the night in the hospital's children's ward, Fonzie worries more about who will be making time with his girl at the Halloween party than the tonsillectomy he's scheduled for the next morning.

programme.title: Happy Days: My Cousin the Cheat
programme.desc: Fonzie is furious with his rebellious cousin, Chachi Arcola, after Chachi cheats on a school test using answers stolen from a tutoring session with Joanie Cunningham.

programme.title: Happy Days: Nose is for News
programme.desc: To prove to his college journalism professor that he has what it takes to be a good investigative reporter, Richie gets down and dirty to expose who's behind an illegal garbage collection scheme.

programme.title: Happy Days: My Fair Fonzie
programme.desc: Snobby Cynthia Holmes schemes with her obnoxious cousin, Skippy, to make the Fonz look foolish at a country club soirée.

programme.title: Happy Days: Bye Bye Blackball
programme.desc: Richie, Ralph, and Potsie endure the harassment of "hell week" to prove themselves worthy to enter their college fraternity, Phi Kappa Nu.

programme.title: Happy Days: Joanie's First Kiss
programme.desc: Sophomore Joanie Cunningham gets basic back-seat defense tips from Richie and Fonzie before her first "car date" with a senior boy, and then cramps her older brother's style when she and her date show up at his college "make-out" party.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Almost Dies
programme.desc: What begins as a humorous escapade with a motorcycle turns into a tragic vigil for the Cunninghams and their friends.

programme.title: Happy Days: Do You Want to Dance
programme.desc: Fonzie's latest romantic interest, a ballet teacher, is secretly yearning to turn professional and dance with the greats in New York. Fonzie, however, has trouble accepting that she may forgo their relationship to pursue her dreams of fame.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fearless Malph
programme.desc: When Ralph Malph is hypnotized to cure his fright after a tornado warning is posted, Ralph's loss of fear causes him to tempt fate by suggesting that the Fonz needs training wheels for his stupid motorcycle

programme.title: Happy Days: Smokin' Ain'T Cool
programme.desc: Joanie believes she has to smoke to fit in with the cool girls. She ignores the pleas from her family to stop, until the Fonz defines what cool really means

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie's Blindness
programme.desc: In a poignant, change-of-pace episode titled Fonzie's Blindness, Al barges through the kitchen door at the drive-in and hits Fonzie in the head with a tray of food.

programme.title: Happy Days: Casanova Cunningham
programme.desc: When Richie is caught two-timing Lori Beth for a pretty baton twirler, the Fonz has to step in and give Richie a few lessons in love.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Gets Framed
programme.desc: Richie and the Fonz visit a massage parlor to escape the pressures of a heated class presidency race, and Richie's opposition photographs the sheet-clad candidate with a pretty masseuse.

programme.title: Happy Days: Potsie Quits School
programme.desc: When troubles with his studies and an insulting professor cause Potsie to quit school, the Fonz comes up with an ingenious but offbeat plan to help his friend.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie'S Funeral (Part 1)
programme.desc: In Part I, Fonzie is called to make emergency mechanical repairs on a stalled hearse and inadvertently discovers thousands of dollars in counterfeit money hidden in the coffin.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie'S Funeral (Part 2)
programme.desc: In Part II, after Fonzie discovers thousands of dollars in counterfeit money in a hearse, the counterfeiters attempt to silence him.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Duel
programme.desc: The Fonz defends America's pride and saves Richie's hide when he matches blades with a French fencing champion, who not only insults the country, but makes nasty remarks about Joanie

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie Gets Shot
programme.desc: During a week-end at Potsie's uncle's hunting cabin, Fonzie is accidentally shot in the vicinity of his favorite jeans' back pocket.

programme.title: Happy Days: American Musical
programme.desc: Struggling to write a school essay on America's immigrant history, Chachi is inspired by Fonzie's colorful story told to the tune of an imagined melting pot melody.

programme.title: Happy Days: Grandma Nussbaum
programme.desc: Grandma Nussbaum teaches Fonzie and Chachi a lesson in growing old gracefully when they try to convince the feisty granny to move into a retirement home.

programme.title: MacGyver: Bind Faith
programme.desc: Pete Thornton agrees to take on the security of an old friend, political refugee Samantha Lora, but finds he can't do the job alone because of a worsening vision problem. He enlists MacGyver's help.

programme.title: MacGyver: Faith, Hope & Charity
programme.desc: MacGyver is drawn into a mobster's search for stolen loot while nursing his injured leg at a country bed and breakfast run by two elderly sisters.

programme.title: MacGyver: Strictly Business
programme.desc: Murdoc is ordered to kill MacGyver in order to prove his loyalty to a professional hit squad.

programme.title: MacGyver: Trail of Tears
programme.desc: MacGyver is drawn into a territorial dispute between an Indian reservation and an electric power company.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Coltons
programme.desc: Using their unorthodox methods, the Coltons combine their individual talents to create a team of world-class bounty hunters in this MacGyver spinoff.

programme.title: MacGyver: Hind-Sight
programme.desc: MacGyver and Pete Thornton reminisce about past adventures as Pete prepares for eye surgery to treat his Glaucoma.

programme.title: MacGyver: Obsessed
programme.desc: MacGyver and the Phoenix Foundation are overseeing the security and protection of Delasora during his trial. MacGyver is obsessed with the death of Murdoc and believes that he's still alive.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Hood
programme.desc: MacGyver's neighbor Kelly Dobbs overhears a plan to have accountant VictorNesbitt murdered. Victor is an accountant with one of Lyle Knox's holding companies and is planning on exposing the company.

programme.title: MacGyver: Honest Abe
programme.desc: MacGyver picks up his best friend's father to take him to his grandson's Bar Mitzvah and finds himself inadvertently involved in an FBI/CIA mission.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Prometheus Syndrome
programme.desc: After Prometheus, a crazed arsonist, is responsible for the death of his old friend, MacGyver sets out to solve the mystery of this madman and capture him.

programme.title: MacGyver: Walking Dead
programme.desc: MacGyver faces the strange and frightening world of Voodoo, as he tries to save his politically active neighbor from a deranged, underground death squad.

programme.title: MacGyver: Good Knight MacGyver-Part 1
programme.desc: A bump on the head takes MacGyver back to 7th century England where he searches for his roots and rescues a beautiful maiden from an evil queen.

programme.title: MacGyver: Good Knight MacGyver-Part 2
programme.desc: A bump on the head takes MacGyver back to 7th century England where he searches for his roots and rescues a beautiful maiden from an evil queen.

programme.title: MacGyver: Deadly Silents
programme.desc: A retired silent film comedian, Pinky, donates his films to the Phoenix Foundation and together, he and MacGyver, find themselves caught in a deadly trap woven by a special effects master named Neil who is out for revenge.

programme.title: MacGyver: Split Decision
programme.desc: MacGyver helps his good friend Dent train for a boxing match and finds that he must rescue Dent's daughter from gamblers who have kidnapped her.

programme.title: MacGyver: Gunz 'N Boys
programme.desc: While working at the Challenger Club, MacGyver finds he must save the local gang kids from Minton, the local gun supplier, who is planning to kill all the gang members as well as letting Brian Jefferies take the wrap for a murder he did not commit.

programme.title: MacGyver: Off the Wall
programme.desc: MacGyver fights to save a housing project after tenants have been forced out of their homes by corrupt money-hungry landlords.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Mountain of Youth
programme.desc: MacGyver and his old friend Jack Dalton discover that inhabitants in a mountain valley live to be over 150 years old. Unfortunately, they also discover that it is the secret site of a heavy water plant used for nuclear weapon technology.

programme.title: Fighter Compilation
programme.desc: Yoel Romero is that guy; let's watch a few of his scraps that prove it.

programme.title: Mit navn er Nobody
programme.desc: En ordentlig spagetti-western signert Sergio Leone. Den beinharde, men slitne sheriffen (Henry Fonda) og hans beundrer og hjelper, den lynraske og frekke Nobody (Terence Hill) rydder opp.

programme.title: Mitt navn er fortsatt Nobody
programme.desc: Den sjarmerende og dovne svindler og revolversvinger Joe Thanks - også kaldt "Nobody" - reiser som en annen gjøgler fra by til by og opptrer i mer eller mindre realistiske revolverdueller.

programme.title: To helskrudde agenter
programme.desc: Rosco lurer fengselsfuglen Doug til å banke opp noen trailersjåfører som har presset ham av veien. I desperasjon tar de flyet på Miami, men nå tror alle at de er CIA-agenter.

programme.title: Vi holder med flodhestene
programme.desc: En av Terence Hill og Bud Spencers aller største suksesser – og det sier ikke lite.

programme.title: Gi' den hele armen
programme.desc: Radarparet Bud Spencer og Terrence Hill har forlatt Ville vesten for et mer moderne miljø. Pilotene Plata og Salud har en jobb utenom det vanlige - ett av oppdragene slår feil og de krasjer i Amazonas' jungel, midt blant råbarkede diamant-tyver.

programme.title: Vestens hardeste neve
programme.desc: I en liten, nedslitt prærieby har Colorada Slim og ganden han overtatt kontrollen. Buddy og indianervennen Cocoa besøker byen, og dessverre for Slim og banden han forstyrrer de Buddy - mens han spiser. Og det kan gjøre Buddy sint - meget sint!

programme.title: Sammen er vi kaos
programme.desc: I Miami begår politiet en utrolig brøler ved å ansette Wilbur Walsh (Spencer) og Matt Kirby (Hill) som patruljerende politiassistenter. Deres utradisjonelle arbeidsmetoder vekker begeistring, selv om de gang på gang prøver å bli kastet ut.

programme.title: Banana Joe
programme.desc: Bud Spencer er Banana Joe, en vennlig kjempe av en banandyrker som bor i en liten Søramerikansk by. Det går livet sin vante gang helt til et stort selskap vil ta over bananplantasjen og sette Joe i fengsel.

programme.title: Skurker og banditter
programme.desc: Tony Roma er tidenes sleipeste gigolo, en skøyer som tar det meste på sparket, spesialisert på å rappe rike husmødres diamanter. Til slutt kobles den hemmelige politimannen Parker inn for endelig å få fakket gigoloen.

programme.title: McLeods døtre
programme.desc: Det er Alex og Stevies bryllupsdag, men slipper Alex ut av fengsel i tide?

programme.title: McLeods døtre
programme.desc: Grace tror hun har forbannet Drovers Run når bisarre utbrudd rammer gården. I mellomtiden er det stolthet versus fordommer når Grace havner i bråk med naboen til Kinsella, Heath Barrett.

programme.title: McLeods døtre
programme.desc: Grace er bestemt på å motstå Heaths sjarm – men hvor lenge? Patrick får en livstruende reaksjon av en øgle. Grace stiller spørsmål ved fremtiden, når hennes beste venninne plutselig dør.

programme.title: McLeods døtre
programme.desc: Grace og Kate blir tatt som gisler av en bonde som har gått konkurs. I mellomtiden får Moira en følelse av at noen blir skutt av våpenmannen, men hvem?

programme.title: McLeods døtre
programme.desc: Livene til alle på Drovers endres for alltid når Stevies datter Rose rammes av en tragisk ulykke.

programme.title: McLeods døtre
programme.desc: En skytsengel besøker Drovers Run for å få jentenes drømmer til å gå i oppfyllelse. Rose kommer tilbake fra sykehus i rullestol, men havner i en uhyggelig bilulykke. Men var det virkelig en ulykke?

programme.title: McLeods døtre
programme.desc: Mens jentene etterforsker en mystisk eksplosjon ved bensindepoet, er den rullestolbundne Rose fanget på husmannsplassen under et frekt ransforsøk.

programme.title: McLeods døtre
programme.desc: Stevies lojalitet til Drovers Run og Graces kontroversielle tørkebeskyttelsesordning blir satt på prøve når hun forlater Drovers og flytter inn i Killarney.

programme.title: McLeods døtre
programme.desc: Kvinnene i Drovers slår seg sammen med mennene fra Killarney for å jakte på det farlige dyret som dreper buskapen på Drovers – er det en villhund eller noe mer eksotisk, som Kate mistenker?

programme.title: McLeods døtre
programme.desc: Blind av kjærlighet bestemmer Kate seg for å stikke av med sin fredløse kjæreste Mitch. I mellomtiden er Drovers Run og andre lokale gårder ofre for en profesjonell brannstifter.

programme.title: McLeods døtre
programme.desc: Grace står overfor en tøff kamp for å redde Ashleighs liv etter at de igjen blir strandet i bushen etter å ha vært involvert i en alvorlig bilulykke på en isolert vei.

programme.title: McLeods døtre
programme.desc: Når Ashleigh krever lånet sitt tilbakebetalt og Drovers er truet, bestemmer jentene seg for å holde en auksjon for å skaffe de nødvendige kontantene og selge alt de kan.

programme.title: McLeods døtre
programme.desc: Grace tar drastiske grep for å fange en kvegtyv, og jentene avdekker Ashleighs plan om sette Drovers Run i konkurs. Kan de stoppe henne før det er for sent?

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Et sirkus kommer til Grantchester, men feiringen blir avbrutt da en tryllekunstner blir funnet død, skutt med pilen fra sitt eget triks. Samtidig blir Will overrasket over å få et tilbud om en ny jobb.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Will blir tvunget til å ta en beslutning. Samtidig ser det ut til at et dødsfall på et lokalt hotell og en baby som er forlatt i kirken henger sammen, noe som fører Geordie og teamet til en lokal jenteskole.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: En rik grunneier blir begravet, det første oppdraget for den nye presten, pastor Alphy Kotteram. Men da sønnen til den avdøde hevder at faren ble myrdet og ikke tok sitt eget liv.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: I et forsøk på å samle inn penger til restaurering av kirken, blir Alphy sendt til en middagsselskap hos de lokale millionærene Lord og Lady Marwood.

programme.title: McLeods døtre
programme.desc: Det er Halloween og skrekkhistoriene jentene forteller over middagen begynner å gå i oppfyllelse. Tayler møter sin mor igjen under bisarre omstendigheter.

programme.title: Fangene på Fortet NO: Episode 1108
programme.desc: Det er lagspillere mot individualister som skal i duell. På det røde fotballaget møter vi Jan Gunnar Solli, Solveig Guldbrandsen og Tobias Becks. På det blå laget finner vi Rasmus Wold, Genette Våge og Victoria Tolaas.

programme.title: Fangene på Fortet NO: Episode 1101
programme.desc: Det er klart for en intens og spektakulær kamp med Kristin Gjelsvik, Dennis Poppe og Oskar Westerlin på det røde laget, mot Herman Dahl, Emilie "Emzia" Helgesen og Christopher Robin Omdahl på det blå laget.

programme.title: Fangene på Fortet NO: Episode 1102
programme.desc: Det er styrke, utholdenhet og akrobatikk som står i fokus når Anders Aukland, Martine Ek Hagen og Marthe Kristoffersen skal kjempe mot Lars Berger, Jonathan Nordbotten og Espen Jansen om den store gullskatten.

programme.title: Fangene på Fortet NO: Episode 1103
programme.desc: Dagens kamp står mellom Abu Hussain, Mayoo Indiran og Stian Sandø på det blå laget, og Alexandra Joner, Lene Orvik og Sebastian Solberg på det røde laget.

programme.title: Fangene på Fortet NO: Episode 1104
programme.desc: Det blir humor, spenning og høyt volum i dagens duell. Med Leif Einar "Lothepus" Lothe, Fetisha Williams og hennes far Byron Williams på det røde laget, og Fritjof Wilborn, Trude Mostue og Egil Andreas Skurdal på det blå laget.

programme.title: Fangene på Fortet NO: Episode 1105
programme.desc: Det er duket for to ekstremt sterke lag i dagens duell. Kampsport-gjengen med Emil Meek og Margaret Aase har med seg Lasse Matberg, og skal kjempe mot iskrigerne Colin Olsen, Jørgen Karterud og legenden Jan Tore Kjær.

programme.title: Fangene på Fortet NO: Episode 1106
programme.desc: Det er to lag fulle av energi og sjarm som møter hverandre i dagens duell. På det røde laget finner vi Nate Khungu, Dennis Siva Lie og Sølje Bergman, som skal kjempe mot Grace Bullen, Morten Thorsen og Lene Alexandra.

programme.title: Fangene på Fortet NO: Episode 1107
programme.desc: En gjeng gourmetkokker møter en gjeng fryktløse fartsfantomer. Christer Rødseth, Christoffer Davidsen og Trond Moi møter rallyfører Mads Østberg, artist Raylee og snøscooterkjører Marie Sandberg.

programme.title: Fangene på Fortet NO: Episode 1108
programme.desc: Det er lagspillere mot individualister som skal i duell. På det røde fotballaget møter vi Jan Gunnar Solli, Solveig Guldbrandsen og Tobias Becks. På det blå laget finner vi Rasmus Wold, Genette Våge og Victoria Tolaas.

programme.title: Fangene på Fortet NO: Episode 1101
programme.desc: Det er klart for en intens og spektakulær kamp med Kristin Gjelsvik, Dennis Poppe og Oskar Westerlin på det røde laget, mot Herman Dahl, Emilie "Emzia" Helgesen og Christopher Robin Omdahl på det blå laget.

programme.title: Fangene på Fortet NO: Episode 1103
programme.desc: Dagens kamp står mellom Abu Hussain, Mayoo Indiran og Stian Sandø på det blå laget, og Alexandra Joner, Lene Orvik og Sebastian Solberg på det røde laget.

programme.title: Fangene på Fortet NO: Episode 1104
programme.desc: Det blir humor, spenning og høyt volum i dagens duell. Med Leif Einar "Lothepus" Lothe, Fetisha Williams og hennes far Byron Williams på det røde laget, og Fritjof Wilborn, Trude Mostue og Egil Andreas Skurdal på det blå laget.

programme.title: Fangene på Fortet NO: Episode 1105
programme.desc: Det er duket for to ekstremt sterke lag i dagens duell. Kampsport-gjengen med Emil Meek og Margaret Aase har med seg Lasse Matberg, og skal kjempe mot iskrigerne Colin Olsen, Jørgen Karterud og legenden Jan Tore Kjær.

programme.title: Fangene på Fortet NO: Episode 1106
programme.desc: Det er to lag fulle av energi og sjarm som møter hverandre i dagens duell. På det røde laget finner vi Nate Khungu, Dennis Siva Lie og Sølje Bergman, som skal kjempe mot Grace Bullen, Morten Thorsen og Lene Alexandra.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Boarding Group One
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at Keegan ikke får lov å gå om bord i flyet sitt, en bølle som nekter å helle ut innholdet i spritflaska og en bokser som sviner til modstanderen sin.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Dubstep
programme.desc: President Obama og hans vredeoversetter, Luther, taler til Mitt Romney, vi møter mannen som skulle holde tale etter Martin Luther Kings 'I Have A Dream'-tale, og to venner prater om hva som skjer med bæsjen deres atter at de skyller ned.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Black Ice News
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer Samuel og Lashawn som gleder seg over fordelene ved sine nå lovlige ekteskap, en politibetjent som møter sin nye makker og Lando fra 'Star Wars' blir forfulgt av et superfan.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Manly Tears
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en narkohandel som går på trynet, en mafiafyr som er en stor grinasabb, og Darius Rucker som prøver å takle sin Hootie-fortid.

programme.title: Key & Peele: East Bowl Rap / West Bowl Rap
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer All-Stars fra East/West bowl som rapper, karene spiller mafioso og de to parkeringstypene har vanskelig for å tro at noen tør å provosere Batmans.
programme.sub-title: East Bowl Rap / West Bowl Rap

programme.title: Key & Peele: Non-Stop Party
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en fyr som jager etter kjæresten sin til verdens ende og LMFAO som ikke kan holde opp med å feste.

programme.title: Key & Peele: MMMMMM
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan opptrer foran et oppstemt publikum, en trafikkreporter blir utsatt for turbulens i et helikopter og halvdelen av en R&B duo avslører sine sanne følelser for sin partner under en opptreden.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Bitch
programme.desc: I denne seriepremierer av komiprogrammet prøver Jordan Peele og Keegan Michael Key å si et forbudt ord om deres kvinner, Lil Wayne venner seg til livet bak lås og slå, og president Obama uttrykker hva han egentlig føler.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The Job Interview
programme.desc: Dommer Jessie har et nytt program, en mann venter på et jobbintervju, to damer sludrer, parkeringsvakter diskuterer Val Kilmer, en pensjonert mann fra hæren hører om et nytt prosjekt og en kvinne introduserer sin forlovede for foreldrene.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Joke Stealing
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en fotballspiller som blir straffet for å juble for mye, Jordan og Keegan som går på premieren på "Othello" og en high school-elev som blir berømt for å stjele en vits.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Alien Imposters
programme.desc: Romvesener invaderer jorden, en familie forliker seg med en slektnings homobryllup og noen rasister gir uttrykk for noen overraskende meninger.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Michael Jackson Halloween
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan feirer Halloween med å flykte fra rasistiske zombier, skuespillerne i 'Human Centipede' har en skremmende gjenforening, og vi besøker en folkeskole for trollmenn med problemer.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Soul Food
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan diskuterer hvem som er mest svart, og å være den eneste svarte på en fest. Sketsjer inkluderer Tea Party som oppdager et nytt håp, hærens ververe som tenker annerledes, og Bobby McFerrin som duellerer mot Michael Winslow.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Meagan's Fight
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at Meagan vender tilbake, Jordan prøver å se kul ut på en strippeklubb og opptrer med et funk-show.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The End
programme.desc: Ray Parker Jr. har noen nye låter, en mann kan ikke slutte å si "deez nuts", Keegan må ringe 112 og en ung mann lærer om Negrotown.

programme.title: Key & Peele: East West Bowl #2
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en introdukjson av de nyeste East/West Bowl-spillerne, utleier-Devon ransaker Jordans leilighet, og Jordan blir støtt av en overseksuell kollega.

programme.title: Key & Peele: A Cappella Club
programme.desc: En PSA jobber med barnesoldater i Afrika, en college-a-cappella-gruppe får et nytt medlem, Meegan og André går på sin første date, en terrorgruppe har en matbil og to gamle menn diskuterer popmusikk.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Pussy On The Chainwax
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer Keegan som blir distraheret mens han snakker i telefon med kjæresten sin, at Keegan og Jordan har en ondskapsfull sjef og hvordan et nytt uttrykk blir til.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Terrorist Meeting
programme.desc: En gangster prøver desperat å bevise at han er gal, terrorister møtes for å planlegge sitt neste trekk og en sjalu storebror gjør familiemiddagen pinlig.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Sex Addict Wendel
programme.desc: Artister blir sparket i skrittet på grunn av kunsten sin, klassens klovn terroriserer læreren og en mann prøver å få hellet med seg på et møte for sexmisbrukere.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Y'all Ready For This?
programme.desc: Et fotballag girer seg opp før en kamp, president Obama og Luther møter Hillary Clinton, to karer forbereder seg på potensielle trusler på et fly, pirater synger en sang og en betjent er litt for skyteglad.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Les Miz
programme.desc: Vi møter vikaren fra bykjernen Mr. Garvey og A-Aron, Jordans kjæreste tar ham i å se på porno og karene har det moro med Les Mis.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Landlord
programme.desc: I sesongfinalen vil president Obama behandles som alle andre, Jordan ser på en leilighet som er eid av en mistenksom utleier, og et par festfiksere som vil få gang i festen på en bar mitzvah.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Hollywood Sequel Doctor
programme.desc: Kileleking mellem to venner blir plutselig merkelig, forfattere brainstormer til 'Gremlins 2', to bøller mistenker vennen sin for å stjele og Keegan og Jordan diskuterer Afrika på en fest.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Das Negroes
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan prøver å gjemme seg for en negerjaktende nazist. Andre sketsjer inkluderer to slaver som sliter med å bli solgt, et par kriminelle som kommer i knipe før et stort kupp.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Bone Thugs And Homeless
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en hund som plager en nyhetsreporter og Harriet Tubman som løper fritt omkring.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Slap-Ass
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at kara har en dårlig Skype-forbindelse, en Django Unchained-slavekamp og en baseballspiller som klasker for mange rumper.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Meegan & Andre Break Up
programme.desc: To venner kommer i klammeri på en klubb, Meegan og André har en seriøs samtale, en rapper går fra et intervju, Conrad flyr business class og Keegan har en ny bart.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Concussion Quarterback
programme.desc: En fotballspiller med hjerneskade prøver å inspirere laget sitt, en mann anklager sin kone for å være utro med en hund og en restauranteier skremmer bort gjestene sine.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Terrible Henchman
programme.desc: En nødsituasjon tvinger en mann til å endre morgenritualet sitt, en medforbryter ødelegger for superskurken og Jordan minner Keegan på at han er voksen nå.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Flicker
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan har en flickerkamp og en MMA-fighter går for langt når han erter motstanderen. Andre sketsjer inkluderer en bryllupsgjest somvil være dj og spille "klassiske" låter.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Severed Head Showcase
programme.desc: En gospel-gruppe må øve uten læreren sin, en gjeng krigere feirer en halshugning, en fange prøver å narre fengselsvakten og en ung mann blir konfrontert fordi han bare snakker i floskler.

programme.title: Key & Peele: MC Mom
programme.desc: En gangster deltar i et skuddrama, en mor skriver en sang til sønnen sin, to bondefangere konkurrerer, Big Boi møter André 3000 og to karer kommer ut for en bilulykke.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Sexy Vampires
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en uhyggelig asiatisk spøkelsessamboer, kara ser på den lyse siden av tortur og Keegan opplever et hus fullt av sexy vampyrer.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Country Music
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer Steve Jobs' efterfølger, Ice-T, som en uoppdragen valp og Rihanna og Chris Brown prøver igjen.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Biological Dad
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer et romvesen som lærer om kvinnelig anatomi, karer som prøver å overgå hverandre og møtet mellom de to siste mennesker på Jorden.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Gang Stand-Off
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer gangstere som er gale etter 'Twilight,' besøk i en verden der navn er promper, og rasistiske superhelter.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Parole Officer Puppet
programme.desc: En tilsynsverge bruker en dukke til å knytte bånd til en person i hans varetekt, en mann med nakkestøtte prøver å feste villt og en soldat har en følelsesladet gjenforening med familien sin.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Obama College Years
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan befinner seg plutselig i en gjenoppføring av Borgerkrigen, Jesus møter en farlig hallik, og vi får en god titt på president Barack Obama de første årene på college.

programme.title: Key & Peele: I'm Retired
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en ungkars-fest som blir underlig og en svart fyr med en hvit penis.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The 420 Special
programme.desc: Neil deGrasse Tyson slapper av hjemme, Keegan må bevare fatningen under et jobbintervju, en skredder får en klient med luft i magen, parkeringsvaktene diskuterer 'Game of Thrones' og en telefonselger prøver en ny strategi.

programme.title: Broad City: Wisdom Teeth
programme.desc: Abbi skal trekke visdomstennene og Ilana ser det som sin plikt å passe henne til hun får det bedre - noe som selvfølgelig innebærer en masse 'medikamenter' og en total mangel på tilsyn.

programme.title: Broad City: Knockoffs
programme.desc: Abbi og Jeremy går på en date som ender med en overraskelse. Ilana og hennes mor leter etter den perfekte håndvesken.

programme.title: Broad City: Hashtag FOMO
programme.desc: Jentene leter etter den perfekte fest, noe som avslører en underlig og surrealistisk side av Abbi, som igjen bekrefter Ilanas verste anelser.

programme.title: Broad City: Citizen Ship
programme.desc: Gjengen skal feire at Jaime har blitt amerikansk statsborger, men Bevers fører Abbi og Ilana på avveier med å love dem gratis sprit. Imens må Lincoln og Jaime klare seg selv blandt alle advokatene.

programme.title: Broad City: Coat Check
programme.desc: Abbi prøver å finne en forsvunnet frakk, mens Ilana utforsker en ny romanse - som føles merkelig kjent.

programme.title: Broad City: St. Mark's
programme.desc: Når jentene feirer Ilanas 23. fødselsdag, blir de avbrudt av en rømt tenåring som fører dem ut på en vill jakt rundt i St. Mark's Place.

programme.title: Broad City: Two Chainz
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana opplever store klesuhell på vei til en venns utstilling og legger ut på en desperat jakt etter et offentlig toalett.

programme.title: Broad City: Co-Op
programme.desc: Abbi må late som om hun er Ilana for å ta hennes skift på jobben, mens Ilana drar til Long Island pga en svært viktig legetime.

programme.title: Broad City: Game Over
programme.desc: Ilana får en ny mulighet på Deals, Deals, Deals, og Abbi prøver å holde konkurranseinstinktet i sjakk på Soulstice Games Day.

programme.title: Broad City: Rat Pack
programme.desc: Etter å ha mottatt en heftig regning for skadedyrsbekjempelse, holder Jaime og Ilana en fest for å dekke kostnadene. I mellomtiden drar Abbi ut på tokt for å møte nye mennesker.

programme.title: Broad City: 2016
programme.desc: Ilana finner sitt nye kall, og Abbi må innom det mest fryktede sted i verden: biltilsynet.

programme.title: Broad City: Philadelphia
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana drar til Philly for å besøke Abbis barndomshjem . Når Abbi innser at hun gjorde en stor tabbe på videregående, drar hun og Ilana på forsoningsoppdrag.

programme.title: Broad City: B&B-NYC
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana legger ut leilighetene sine på B & B-NYC for å tjene litt ekstra penger.

programme.title: Broad City: Burning Bridges
programme.desc: Ilanas foreldre kommer til byen for deres 30-årsjubileum, men Abbi og Ilana syns det er vanskelig å feire når de begge opplever samlivsproblemer.

programme.title: Broad City: Getting There
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana skal ut på tur, men bare det å komme seg til flyplassen viser seg å være mye vanskeligere enn forventet.

programme.title: Broad City: Jews on a Plane
programme.desc: Abbi får mensen under en flytur, så hun og Ilana går drastisk til verks for å finne en tampong.

programme.title: Broad City: Sliding Doors
programme.desc: En vårdag i 2011 møtes Abbi og Ilana for første gang.

programme.title: Broad City: Twaining Day
programme.desc: Abbis korte tilbakekomst til Soulstice blir interessant når hun får opplæringsmuligheten som hun alltid har drømt om. I mellomtiden får Ilana en ny jobb på en restaurant.

programme.title: Broad City: Just the Tips
programme.desc: Ilana går amok med pengene hun tjente på servitørjobben, og Abbis nye forhold gjør at det lyser av henne. På fest senere den kvelden, møter jentene på en gammel venn.

programme.title: Broad City: Mushrooms
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana ruser seg på sopp og opplever en hendelsesrik trip.

programme.title: Broad City: Abbi's Mom
programme.desc: Abbis mor kommer til byen på besøk, og Ilana navigerer Sushi Mambeaux' intense arbeidskultur samtidig som hun håndterer sin sesongavhengig depresjon.

programme.title: Broad City: Witches
programme.desc: Abbi føler seg gammel etter å ha funnet et grått hår; Ilana går til en sexterapeut.

programme.title: Broad City: Florida
programme.desc: Abbi, Ilana, Eliot og Bobbi drar til Florida for å rydde ut av Grandma Esthers leilighet.

programme.title: Broad City: House Sitting
programme.desc: Abbi, Ilana, Jaime og Lincoln passer huset til Strands. Ilana og Lincoln definerer forholdet deres, og Abbi går på en Bumble-date med en mann fra fortiden hennes.

programme.title: Broad City: Bed Bugs
programme.desc: En fancy ny veske gir Abbi tillit under arbeidsledigheten. Ilana og Jaimé må ta tak i et uunngåelig New York City-mareritt.

programme.title: Broad City: Friendiversary
programme.desc: Jentenes 'Friendiversary' utvikler seg i en farlig retning når de blir vitne til noe forferdelig.

programme.title: Broad City: Stories
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana farer fra toppen av Manhattan til bunnen for å feire Abbis 30-årsdag, og treffer på både gamle og nye venner på veien.

programme.title: Broad City: Shework and S**t Bucket
programme.desc: Ilana gir seg i kast med sin seneste mulighet til å tjene penger da hun en åpner et utendørs kontorlandskap for New Yorks røykere; Abbi konfronterer husverten sin da han nekter å modernisere sanitæranlegget hennes.

programme.title: Broad City: Bitcoin & the Missing Girl
programme.desc: Ilana besøker en gammel flamme for å få sin del av en Bitcoin-formue; Abbi glemmer klesvasken sin for første gang, og mister favorittgenseren sin.

programme.title: Broad City: Make the Space
programme.desc: Ilana oppdager en skremmende hemmelighet om Jaimé; Abbi prøver å avansere fra genserbretter til vinduskunstner på Anthropologie.

programme.title: Broad City: Artsy Fartsy
programme.desc: Abbi inviteres til et fancy kunstarrangement på MoMA; Ilana og Lincoln analyserer det første året de har vært sammen.

programme.title: Broad City: Lost and Found
programme.desc: Jentene møter Ilanas femtenmenning, som overlevde Holocaust, og tar ham med på en kjedelig brunch; Abbi prøver en ny look.

programme.title: Broad City: Shenanigans
programme.desc: Ilana rekrutteres som hårmodell; Abbis nye flamme forteller henne at hun ikke er moden nok.

programme.title: Broad City: Sleep No More
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana besøker 'Sleep No More', og Abbi prøver å finne rett tidspunkt for å fortelle Ilana noe som vil forandre livet hennes radikalt.

programme.title: Broad City: Along Came Molly
programme.desc: Abbi, Ilana og Bevers selger Abbis eiendeler i New York; Abbi får billetter til en Lil Wayne-konsert, og jentene tar en 'tripp'.

programme.title: Broad City: Broad City
programme.desc: Jentene tar farvel.

programme.title: Broad City: What A Wonderful World
programme.desc: Ilana får nyss om en hemmelig Lil Wayne-konsert. Sammen med Abbi loffer hun seg frem i New York. Jentene lar ingenting hindre dem i å skrape sammen nok penger til billettene. Selv om det blir skremmende, mister de aldri målet av sikte.

programme.title: Broad City: Stolen Phone
programme.desc: Etter å ha prøvd å finne gutter på Facebook, bestemmer Abbi og Ilana seg for å prøve å finne gutter i 'virkeligheten'.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ta frem bestikket! Fire fremmede konkurrerer om penger og tittelen som den ultimate vert for middagsselskapet, følg med for en spicy konkurranse.

programme.title: South Park: Bestevenner for alltid
programme.desc: Cartmans blir sjalu når Kenny får det siste nye bærbare spillet før lekebutikkene går tomme. Vil Cartman og Kenny kunne forbli bestevenner for alltid?

programme.title: South Park: Midtbyen
programme.desc: South Parks bykjerne holder på å oppgraderes og Kenny bestemmer bestemmer seg for at det er på tide å skaffe en jobb.

programme.title: South Park: Coon 2: Etterpåklokskap
programme.desc: Superhelten 'The Coon' er tilbake og denne gangen har han venner!

programme.title: South Park: Døden
programme.desc: Stans bestefar prøver å lure guttene til å drepe ham. Foreldrene i South Park prøver å få stanset sendingene av 'Terrance and Phillip'.

programme.title: South Park: Den fattige ungen
programme.desc: Kennys foreldre blir arrestert og han plasseres i fosterhjem - så nå er Cartman det fattigste barnet på skolen! I mellomtiden kommer en mystisk figur fra fortiden tilbake.

programme.title: South Park: Mecha Streisand
programme.desc: Cartman og Kyle krangler om et magisk triangel som kan forvandle Barbra Streisand til et fryktelig monster.

programme.title: South Park: Mysterion reiser seg
programme.desc: Ført an av 'Mysterion', jobber 'Coon' og vennene hans med å hjelpe folk i Gulfen. Og 'Coon' er ute etter hevn.

programme.title: South Park: Kyllingelskeren
programme.desc: Barbrady ber guttene om hjelp til å løse en sak, og Cartman lar seg rive med av sin nye autoritet.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman får en analundersøkelse
programme.desc: Cartman drømmer at han møter et romvesen, men de andre guttene er sikre på at drømmen var virkelighet.

programme.title: South Park: En stige til himmelen
programme.desc: Guttene bryter seg inn for å stjele urnen med Kennys aske.

programme.title: South Park: Hyllusinasjoner
programme.desc: De hysteriske foreldrene i South Park får enda en grunn til panikk når 'cheesing' blir poplært blant barna.

programme.title: South Park: Selvantenning
programme.desc: Innbyggerne i South Park begynner å eksplodere uten forvarsel. Stans far tar saken.

programme.title: South Park: Øyekatarr
programme.desc: Det er Halloween i South Park, og Kenny blir drept av en styrtende romstasjon og forvandlet til en zombie, ved hjelp av balsameringsvæske og Worcestersaus.

programme.title: South Park: Universets største drittsekk
programme.desc: Cartman føler seg ikke bra etter å ha drukket Kennys aske og blitt besatt av sjelen hans, og sendes til sykehuset.

programme.title: South Park: Tamponger av cherokeehår
programme.desc: Kyle trenger nyretransplantasjon og Cartman er den perfekte donor, men setter en høy pris for nyren: 10 millioner dollar.

programme.title: South Park: Kenny dør
programme.desc: Kenny utvikler en dødelig sykdom, og Stan har problemer med å takle det.

programme.title: South Park: Chef Aid
programme.desc: Chef prøver å kreve royalties da et plateselskap slipper en låt han hevder han skrev for over 20 år siden.

programme.title: South Park: Ringen
programme.desc: Kenny tar med den nye kjæresten sin til en Jonas Brothers-konsert der de får kyskhetsringer.

programme.title: South Park: Dilla på apefonetikk
programme.desc: Guttene konkurrerer mot hjemmeunderviste barn i South Parks årlige stavekonkurranse.

programme.title: South Park: Bestevenner for alltid
programme.desc: Cartmans blir sjalu når Kenny får det siste nye bærbare spillet før lekebutikkene går tomme. Vil Cartman og Kenny kunne forbli bestevenner for alltid?
