programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline supports Del in his efforts to expand business for her "Caroline in the City" cartoon strip and merchandise.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline's naive, helpful nature comes out in full bloom when she starts catering to her new elderly neighbor, Miriam, but Annie thinks Caroline is being taken advantage of.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline discovers that only one newspaper in the country has not renewed her cartoon strip, she obsesses on the matter until finally convincing herself to face the editors in person.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline has difficulty confronting her neglectful building superintendent, Mr. Tedescu about her faulty plumbing, so she hires a mediator to pressure Mr. Tedescu into taking care of her request.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard is stunned when his former love Julia informs him that she is about to be married.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: In the ongoing charade of Caroline pretending that she and Richard are married.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: A remorseful Caroline panics when she realizes that several hours have passed since she poured her heart out to Richard on his answering machine -- and she hasn't heard a response from him.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline realizes that the constant aching in her neck could be related to the stress she feels over her unresolved feelings toward Richard, but she doesn't let it get in the way of helping Richard navigate through troubled waters with Julia.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline feigns having read a writer’s novel to impress him, but their first date is a disaster as Caroline’s charade crumbles. Meanwhile, Richard jumps to Julia’s rescue when her waitress job at Remo’s leaves her customers hungry for attention.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline discovers that she’s been receiving free cable, her honesty with the cable company gets her into deep trouble with her not-so-truthful neighbors.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Annie is visited by her old singing teacher, Miss McGowan, Caroline helps Annie pretend to still have her “Cats” role, an act that may have a surprise ending.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: It’s a game of messy politics when Caroline will not endorse a local councilman, who is inspired by her comic strip, while Del conjures up a promotional campaign.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Discreetly planning to ease Caroline’s homesick holiday blues, Richard (Malcolm Gets) goes to great lengths to get a gift for Caroline that inspires suspicion in Julia (Sofia Milos) and sleuthing from Caroline and Annie.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And The Used Car Salesman

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Informed by Annie (Amy Pietz) of Caroline’s (LeaThompson) unspoken love for him, Richard (Malcolm Gets) confronts Caroline, who tells him that it’s a thing of the past.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And The Love That Dare Not Speak Its Name

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline (Lea Thompson) is tapped as a celebrity guest star for a quiz show, her jitters prompt Richard (Malcolm Gets) to help her study, much to Julia’s (Sofia Milos) chagrin.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) tries to convince an insecure Del(Eric Lutes) that he has the potential to be a great parent after Del is shocked to discover that he is the father of a 10-year old girl.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Julia (Sofia Milos) tells Caroline (Lea Thompson) that it’s not easy being on the outside of her close working relationship with Richard (Malcolm Gets), Caroline quickly, and mysteriously, learns what it’s like to walk a mile in Julia’s shoes.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: As Caroline (Lea Thompson) struggles with commitment issues over Trevor, Richard(Malcolm Gets) inadvertently causes a rift between Caroline and her new beau.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline (Lea Thompson) is insulted by a local cabbie, Adamo, she takes her case to higher powers at the travel commission. Meanwhile, Richard, frustrated by a “painter’s block,” becomes obsessed with computers when he joins a cyber cafe.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline’s (Lea Thompson)mother, Margaret Duffy (guest star Edie McClurg, “The Hogan Family”), visits Caroline for a mother-daughter People magazine shoot, tensions rise over unexpressed feelings.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And The Visit From The Mom

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) must hire a new cartoon colorist when Richard (Malcolm Gets) finally quits after he and Julia (Sofia Milos) move into their glamorous new home.
programme.sub-title: Caroline and the Marriage Counselor, Pt. 1

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: The fourth-season opener finds Caroline (Lea Thompson) and Richard (Malcolm Gets) savoring their first passionate kiss and preparing for romance.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And The Guys In The Bathroom

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Vengeful father-in-law Mr. Mazzone strips Richard (Malcolm Gets) of all his worldly possessions, forcing Richard to take temporary refuge in Caroline's (Lea Thompson) new office, where he runs afoul of Plum, the no-nonsense office manager.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: After Caroline (Lea Thompson) inadvertently offends office manager Plum (guest star Nancy Lenehan, "Grace Under Fire"), she and Richard (Malcolm Gets) are banished to a damp, dark basement office.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: After Annie (Amy Pietz) loses her boyfriend, her job and her agent, she impulsively accepts a date with her local drycleaner, Gil (guest star Ken Campbell),and spends an evening to remember.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) and Richard (Malcolm Gets) decide to go out on their first official "date" together on Halloween, but their romantic evening turns into fright night when Richard gets himself into a rooftop jam.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline stumbles across Richard's (Malcolm Gets) divorce papers in his desk drawer, but an office mishap sends her on a frantic paper chase to retrieve the documents after they are lost in the interoffice mail.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Tired of losing acting roles to other, more well-endowed women, Annie (Amy Pietz) surprises the gang on Thanksgiving Day by announcing that she plans to get breast implants.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard gets an offer that his empty bank account can't refuse: his Aunt Frieda promises to give him $5,000 as a Bar Mitzvah gift if he agrees to finally go through the ceremony.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard (Malcolm Gets) agrees to let Reg become a houseguest after the cartoonist has a fight with his girlfriend, Wanda.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And The Big Bad Bed

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) and Del (Eric Lutes) experience mixed results when they become office mentors to a young cartoonist with an overactive libido and an eager marketing student.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) tries to take Charlie (guest star Andy Lauer) under her wing and teach him the fundamentals of life after Del (Eric Lutes) is forced to fire the hapless in-line skater from his job at the greeting card company.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) tries to right an old wrong by giving up a romantic weekend in Boston with Richard (Malcolm Gets) to help out a visiting childhood chum, Joanie (guest star Kelly Coffield), whom Caroline once bullied in school.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And Joanie And The Stick

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) and the gang visit Caroline's family home in Pestigo, Wisconsin, but the homecoming is ruined when her parents tell Caroline that they are selling the house.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) gives Richard(Malcolm Gets) a 7 p.m. deadline to make a marital commitment to her, then is coerced into spending the day making pottery with Del (Eric Lutes) and Annie (Amy Pietz) while she anxiously awaits his decision.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: After deciding they can't wait to get married, Caroline (Lea Thompson) and Richard (Malcolm Gets) plan their nuptials for the following week.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: As Caroline and Richard (Malcolm Gets) prepare to leave for Italy to visit his newborn son, Richard makes a confession that gives Caroline second thoughts about their future together.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The high-spirited taxi gang helps a jittery Bobby fight potential disappointment when he decides that he will end his stage career if he doesn’t get an acting job before midnight.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas faces deportation unless he marries a U.S. citizen. The taxi gang comes to his rescue by pitching in and hiring a local working girl to be his bride.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: John and his new wife, Suzanne, reach a crisis point in their marriage when one of them must drop out of college due to financial woes.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A Christmas party at the garage is interrupted when Louie, the dispatcher teams up with Alex in a game of high-stakes poker against his cardshark brother Nick.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The taxi gang scrambles to come up with a scheme aimed at ending a one-sided romance when a determined, pretty cabbie sets her cap for Tony and joins the Sunshine Cab Co. to be near him.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex feels sympathy for a fare who’s a real loser with the women and arranges a date for the man with Elaine, who later discovers that her klutzy companion for the evening is a U.S. Congressman.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby’s career dreams come true when he lands a role in a soap opera, prompting him to throw his torn-up cabbie’s license at Louie, but the dispatcher vows to take revenge if Bobby ever comes crawling back.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: After an operation, Louie, the sharp-tongued dispatcher, panics when he has to keep a promise that he made to God during surgery to turn over a new leaf.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas’ youthful and attractive mother makes her first visit to America, and after she and Alex meet and have an evening love affair, Latka assumes that he will soon be getting a new daddy.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Alex’s ear is nearly shot off in a holdup attempt in his cab, he stuns his fellow cabbies by quitting and exchanging his driving clothes for a waiter’s tuxedo at a snobbish French restaurant.
programme.sub-title: Alex Tastes Death & Finds A Nice Restaurant

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies fall victim to a Hollywood-style roller coaster ride when a production company visits to do a film on taxi drivers. Life at the Sunshine Cab Company turns into a continual champagne and buffet festivity.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When John crashes Cab 804, the cabbies are shocked into a period of mourning, as they reminisce about the wild and memorable events that occurred when they were driving the legendary cab.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas frantically works to save the cracked-up Cab 804 as the cabbies fondly recall times in the legendary auto when Alex delivered a baby, Louie beat a rich brat out of a wad of money, and Elaine met the perfect man.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a dream come true for Tony when he’s challenged by an aging ex-champ, but he has more than just a fight on his hand when the opposition unveils its secret weapon.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies are in for a comedy surprise when the small town kid Bobby befriends, Steve, lands a big role as Romeo the first day he arrives in the Big Apple.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex tells Elaine that her hectic schedule of being a mother, a cabbie and a museum employee is driving her crazy and that she should see a psychiatrist. Elaine decides that a quicker cure would be to spend the night with Alex.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby and Tony’s friendship is on the line when they become embroiled in a hilarious love triangle and attempt to outdo each other in vying for the affection of a beautiful young lady.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The overweight blind date Alex once had returned to the scene a svelte shell of her former self, and eager for the romance she yearns for with Alex
programme.sub-title: The Lighter Side Of Angela Matusa

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The riotous race of the century pits Alex against Louie in a winner-take-all bet to see who can bring in the most receipts. Lecherous Louie uses every dirty trick in the book to make sure he wins his prize—an evening with Elaine.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine suddenly starts getting mysterious love letters. When she becomes intrigued by the poetic propositions, a couple of cabbies quickly claim responsibility, leaving Elaine with the hilarious task of discovering who is the amorous writer.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie makes a horrible first impression on girlfriend Zena’s parents on Taxi. Louie’s romance with girlfriend Zena takes an outrageous twist when she brings him home to meet her parents.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies try to make Tony a family man when they convince him to adopt the adorably precocious eight-year-old boy named Brian whom he befriended.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a hilarious shock to the cabbies when Rev. Jim brings his new pet to the garage—an over-the-hill racehorse that he bought after cashing in on the 300-to-1 long shot. However, he soon finds that it’s impossible to housebreak a horse.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby faces a humorous predicament when it becomes obvious that one of the biggest talent managers in New York is representing him because of his prowess as a lover, and not for his ability as an actor.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: In a protest against unsafe equipment, the cabbies go on strike, and Louie offers an unusual solution to the problem to shop steward Elaine.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: In a hilarious caper, Louie and the cabbies pool all their cash to buy a painting at an auction, planning to cash in big when the artist dies—but when the bidding gets too heavy, the gang turns a dignified auction into a frolicking free-for-all.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie, the dispatcher, becomes a lovesick pup after his girlfriend finds another guy. He will stop at nothing to get her back, including recruiting Alex for his hilarious scheme—and the riotous shenanigans at the Sunshine Cab Co. never stop.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a riotous family reunion when Jim returns home to face his millionaire dad for the first time since he dropped out of society in the ‘60s, and Alex has his hands full with Jim’s voluptuous, overly amorous sister,

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The Taxi gang falls prey to hilarious fear for homeless Elaine’s romantic well-being when chivalrous Bobby allows her to live in his apartment while he is gone. Unexpectedly, he returns before she has found other quarters

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Hilarious sparks fly when Tony tries to fix up his divorced sister with Alex. Instead, she ends up falling for Reverend Jim and Tony goes outrageously overboard trying to break up the affair.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie the dispatcher has the dubious honor of being selected by his employer’s revenge-seeking wife to be her clandestine lover, and comedic panic grips the love lair when the boss shows up unexpectedly.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Wild and crazy theatrics erupt when Tony decides to become an actor and Bobby, as his skeptical agent, is aghast when Tony lands a role because he is the right type.

programme.title: South Park: Er du der, Gud? Det er meg, Jesus
programme.desc: Alle guttene blir sjalu da Cartman påstår at han har kommet i puberteten. Jesus lover South Parks innbyggere en spektakulær nyttårsfeiring.
programme.sub-title: Er du der, Gud? Det er meg, Jesus

programme.title: South Park: Musikalen 'Hellen Keller!'
programme.desc: Guttene setter opp sin egen versjon av Helen Kellers historie for å overgå barnehagens forestilling.

programme.title: South Park: En svært elendig jul
programme.desc: Kyle og Ike venter i spenning på Mr. Hankey. Når han ikke kommer, innkaller Kyle de andre til krisemøte.

programme.title: South Park: Rød slede nedskutt
programme.desc: Med julenissens, herr Hankeys og Jesus sin hjelp, forsøker Cartman å bringe julen til Iraks underkuete befolkning.

programme.title: South Park: Det er jul i Kanada
programme.desc: Kyles adoptivbror Ike blir hentet av sine biologiske foreldre fordi den kanadiske statsministeren har bestemt at alle bortadopterte kanadiske barn må returnere til landet.

programme.title: South Park: Skogsdyrenes jul
programme.desc: Julenissen må drepe alle onde dyr i South Park og redde verden etter at Stan narres til å hjelpe dem med fødselen til frelseren deres.

programme.title: South Park: South Parks fantastiske påskespesial
programme.desc: Stan vil finne opprinnelsen til malte påskeegg og oppdager en hemmelighet om den katolske kirken.

programme.title: South Park: Thanksgiving på History Channel
programme.desc: Når gutta prøver å lære seg alt om Thanksgiving fra historiekanalen på TV, blir de fanget i et mysterium som involverer utenomjordiske, Natalie Portman og kalkunfyll!

programme.title: South Park: Black Friday
programme.desc: Gutta forbereder seg på å slåss mot andre kunder på første dag i julehandelen.

programme.title: South Park: Gjennom ræv og ild
programme.desc: 'Svartefredag' nærmer seg og kampen om spillkonsollene blir mer intens - og siden prinsessen Kenny svek Cartman, er han ute etter hevn.

programme.title: South Park: Pupper og drager
programme.desc: Dørene til kjøpesenteret skal endelig åpnes for det største 'Svartefredagsalget' i historien. Gutta er uenige om hvilket spillutstyr de skal kjøpe, og et blodig slag vil avgjøre om Xbox eller Sony blir vinneren.

programme.title: South Park: Glade hologram
programme.desc: Cartman trender, mens resten av USA forbereder seg til det største juleprogrammet på tv noensinne.

programme.title: South Park: Bæsjeproblemer
programme.desc: Mr Hankeys støtende oppførsel får ham nesten avskjediget som leder for det årlige julespillet. Samtidig blir South Park grunnskoles Strong Woman og rektor PKs forhold utfordret på helt nye måter.

programme.title: South Park: Sykkelparaden
programme.desc: Guttenes vinnersjanse i sykkelparaden settes på spill når Kenny trekker seg.

programme.title: South Park: Julesnø
programme.desc: Julenissen dreper all glede under julefeiringen i byen.

programme.title: South Park: Starvin' Marvin
programme.desc: I en reklamepause under 'Terrance and Phillip' bestemmer guttene seg for å adoptere et etiopisk barn for å få en gratis klokke.

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Hankey, julebæsjen
programme.desc: Borgermesteren vil lage en høytidsfeiring som ikke støter noen, og Kyle tror han har løsningen.

programme.title: South Park: God jul, Charlie Manson!
programme.desc: Onkel Howard rømmer fra fengsel sammen med Charlie Manson, som er klar til å nyte friheten, men blir distrahert av et juleprogram.

programme.title: South Park: Starvin' Marvin i verdensrommet
programme.desc: Marvin er tilbake! Han og guttene reiser verden rundt for å finne mat, med CIA og Sally Struthers hakk i hæl.

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Hankeys juleklassikere
programme.desc: Denne spesialepisoden har numre fra Mr. Hankey's Christmas Collection Album.

programme.title: South Park: Er du der, Gud? Det er meg, Jesus
programme.desc: Alle guttene blir sjalu da Cartman påstår at han har kommet i puberteten. Jesus lover South Parks innbyggere en spektakulær nyttårsfeiring.
programme.sub-title: Er du der, Gud? Det er meg, Jesus

programme.title: The Vault
programme.desc: Legends League: Night 2, Group B.

programme.title: Champions Talk
programme.desc: Gemma Hayter reflects on her 2024 WADC Championship Tour Final win and looks ahead to her Ally Pally debut.

programme.title: Break of Throw: Series 1 & 2 Champions
programme.desc: Glen Durrant studies the throws of Series 1 & 2 Champions, Conan Whitehead and Raymond Smith.

programme.title: Inside the ADC: The Rise of Amateur Darts
programme.desc: Explore how the ADC's thriving events offer opportunities for amateur players, with a behind-the-scenes look.

programme.title: Tungsten Talk
programme.desc: Paul Nicholson meets Peter Wachiuri to discuss his rise and growing impact on African darts.

programme.title: The Double Trouble Challenge II
programme.desc: Featuring Simon Whitlock, Steve Beaton and more.

programme.title: Break of Throw: Beau Greaves and Fallon Sherrock
programme.desc: Laura Turner analyses the throws of two top female competitors in the game, Beau Greaves and Fallon Sherrock.

programme.title: Tungsten Talk
programme.desc: Richie Burnett joins Paul Nicholson on Tungsten Talk to delve into memorable moments on the darts circuit.

programme.title: The Greatest Darts Matches Ever
programme.desc: Paul Hinks and Keegan Brown join Chris Murphy to discuss the greatest darts matches of all time!

programme.title: Tungsten Talk
programme.desc: Paul Nicholson interviews two promising emerging talents in the world of darts: Charlie Manby & Henry Coates.

programme.title: Darts
programme.desc: Teammates become rivals as players from the same nation face off in a bullseye battle.
programme.sub-title: International Pairs Week Bullseye Challenge: Teammates Face Off

programme.title: Break of Throw: PDC Stars
programme.desc: Devon Petersen dissects the power and precision of Joe Cullen and Jonny Clayton's iconic throws.

programme.title: The Story of Michael van Gerwen
programme.desc: Henry Deacon and Paul Nicholson discuss the inspiring story of one of darts' greatest, Michael van Gerwen.

programme.title: The Vault
programme.desc: Full session replay of the Legends League: Finals Night.

programme.title: MODUS Moments: Scots on the Oche
programme.desc: Dart døgnet rundt! Her hos oss viser vi direkte ukelige turneringer, seks dager i uken og 50 uker i året. I tillegg sender vi nyheter, ulike reportasjer og intervjuer med de største navnene og personlighetene både forran og bak ochen!

programme.title: Paul Hinks: Most Iconic Moments
programme.desc: Refereeing legend Paul Hinks reveals how his career began and relives his most iconic moments.

programme.title: Break of Throw: Spotting and Counting
programme.desc: Owen Binks explains spotting and counting, guided by players' complex preferred routes and throwing styles.

programme.title: Murph Meets
programme.desc: Two-time world champion Adrian Lewis steps back into the spotlight in an exclusive interview with Chris Murphy.

programme.title: Darts Biggest Bust-Ups
programme.desc: Matthew Edgar and Henry Deacon discuss the biggest bust-ups in darts and the most dramatic moments.

programme.title: Angry Ginge Vs The Bullseye Challenge
programme.desc: Angry Ginge Vs The Bullseye Challenge - featuring AwayDays, ThisIsFG and more!

programme.title: MODUS Super Series Darts
programme.desc: Relive one of the best moments from the Influencer Showdown as 13-year-old Jayden Walker takes on Adrian Lewis.

programme.title: Break of Throw: Craziest Throws
programme.desc: Devon Petersen analyzes the unique and wild throws of Richie Burnett and John Henderson.

programme.title: Tungsten Talk
programme.desc: John Henderson joins Tungsten Talk to reflect on his proudest achievements as a Scotsman in the world of darts.

programme.title: MODUS Moments: Champions Edition
programme.desc: Paul Nicholson sits down with past MODUS Super Series Champions to relive their top moments at the Live Lounge.

programme.title: The Best of Jimmy van Schie: Top Moments & Highlights
programme.desc: Relive the best moments from Jimmy van Schie with his top highlights and unforgettable darts action!

programme.title: Horse & Country
programme.desc: "Denne kanalen tilbyr den beste blandingen av spesialisert hestesport som inkluderer sport, trening, underholdning og dokumentar. Bli med for ukentlige direktesendinger som viser konkurranser innen sprangridning, travsport og dressur."

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Single J-Woww
programme.desc: J-Woww bli offisielt skilt og det er på tide å feire det på storslått måte. Mike renvasker seg fra all møkka om hans tid på college.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Chicken Cutlets and Ketchup
programme.desc: Vinnys mor Paola, forbereder en storslått italiensk fest for Mike, og onkel Nino blir med. Samtidig inviterer Angelina en uventet gjest til baren.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Shorefather
programme.desc: Det er premierekveld for Guidos-ene da de ser en film de har laget for å hedre Mike. De klaemmer åtte måneder inn i en kveld og gjenskaper hva Mike gikk glipp av da han satt inne.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Prenups and Misdemeanors
programme.desc: Gjengen trenger GTL. Angelina trenger en særeie-advokat. Jenni og Nicole trenger en spade - for å grave opp beviset med.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Unresolved Issues
programme.desc: Det er tid for utdrikningsfest og jentene drar til New Orleans for å feire Angelina. Men uløste problemer truer med å ødelegge hele greia.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Crash the Bachelorette
programme.desc: Jenni og Angelina renser luften. Og operasjon 'knus utdrikningslaget' får full effekt når Mike, Vinny og Pauly klekker en plan for å overta jentenes helg i New Orleans.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Beignets, Blow Up Dolls and Bridesmaids
programme.desc: Jenny står i spissen for Vinny. Er det en fugl, et fly eller The Designation?
programme.sub-title: Beignets, Blow Up Dolls and Bridesmaids

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: P-WOWW
programme.desc: Angelinas utdrikningsfest er overtatt av gutta og begynner med strippeklubben og slutter med at Pauly og Jenny ligger i samme seng.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: So That Happened!
programme.desc: Nedtellingen til Angelinas bryllup begynner. Mike avanserer og Pauly D og Jenni ville natt får samboerne til å stille mange spørsmål.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Rewriting History
programme.desc: Angelinas bryllup er like rundt hjørnet så gjengen feirer henne med en tur til Jersey Shore.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: You Had Me At Um, Hello!
programme.desc: Den store dagen er endelig her! Jenni føler seg forhekset, Angelina velsignet og Mike litt oransje.
programme.sub-title: You Had Me At Um, Hello!

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Speech Part 1
programme.desc: Angelina og Chris gifter seg. Vinny protesterer og jentenes tale til bruden leder til buing i Staten Island-stil.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Speech Part 2
programme.desc: Angelinas bryllupsfest blir kaotisk når Deena, Jenni og Nicole holder tale. Jentene blir forskrekket, Angelina raser og guttene prøver å gjøre det godt igjen. Men skaden er kanskje allerede gjort.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Mediation
programme.desc: To dager etter Angelinas bryllup, er jentene helt på tuppa over talen som ble hørt verden rundt. Og Mike "The Situation" blir megler i håp om å føre familien sammen igjen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Taken Pauly
programme.desc: Midt oppi en global pandemi, fortsetter jentene med sosial distansering, men ikke på grunn av covid-19. Pauly er full av overraskelser når samboerne får vite at han ikke sitter i karantene alene.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Double Book
programme.desc: Desperate tider krever desperate tiltak og gutta er klare for en familieferie. R, S, V og P har en sniken overraskelse for å få jentene sammen igjen, men Deena har en egen overraskelse som kan komplisere alt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Single Ronnie
programme.desc: Nedtellingen til Angelina kommer er i gang, og gutta må finne ut hvordan de skal presentere nyheten for Deena. Samtidig prøver gjengen å spille Kirsten giftekniv ved å lage et datingprogram til singel-Ronnie.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Trouble Shot At Love
programme.desc: Datingprogram-ekspertene DJ Pauly D og Vinny Guadagnino er programledere. Seks jenter konkurrerer om den ultimate ungkarens kjærlighet, Ronnie Magro, i det splitter nye datingprogrammet "A trouble shot at love."

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Jurrasic Angelina
programme.desc: Dobbeltbokingen blir full av følelser da Angelina slår ned i Las Vegas-sjøen. Deena blir på tuppa når hun kommer og Vinny dukker for slagene og The Situation blir overveldet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Text
programme.desc: 'The Situation' glemmer middagsplanene og deretter at han er i et tv-program. Og en sms hjemmefra ryster samboerne og truer med å blåse hele ferien i lufta.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Attack of the Killer Raccoons
programme.desc: Pauly kaver for å få Deena og Angelina ombord med en familiemiddag før Nikki kommer. Men en gjeng med vaskebjørner ødelegger nesten planen. Tilbake i Jersey, går Jenni glipp av noe viktig.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Matt, Simon and Lucy try to save Mary from ruthless debt collectors.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Mary is sent to live with her grandfather in Buffalo against her will.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: The Camdens are torn apart by harsh rumors after Mary's departure to Buffalo.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Simon's new friends target Lucy and Annie as victims of their harassment.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: The Camden clan thinks Eric has lost it when he opens the home to Mary's ex- boyfriend.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Robbie is such a good house guest that Annie and Matt feel underappreciated.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Mary sneaks back to Glenoak and Eric is right on her tail.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Lucy gets jealous when her new love interest asks her to set him up with another girl.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Lucy's first date turns out to be an ex-boyfriend reunion.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: No one thinks Simon will do the right thing when he finds himself alone with an attractive, older girl.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Eric fears that Robbie's estranged father will destroy his future.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Matt fears a therapist will reveal his inability to succeed as a doctor.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Robbie spends time with a girl that looks identical to Mary.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Simon is mortified when his mother's admission gets him nicknamed Virgin Camden by his classmates.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Ruthie circulates a petition to keep a well-liked African American teacher from getting fired.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Robbie adopts a hands-off policy when Mary comes home for the summer.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Lucy discovers the truth about her boyfriend's past with Mary.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Eric's stress level soars when his family experiences growing pains.

programme.title: Police Story 3: Supercop
programme.desc: Politiinspektøren Chan Ka-Kui går undercover i et kinesisk fængsel for at infiltrere et hensynsløst narkokartel. Sammen med undercover-agenten Jessica Yang rejser de til Hongkong for at slutte sig til Panthers bande. Denne film vises uden undertekster.

programme.title: Royal Warriors
programme.desc: Michelle Yip er en kung fu-ekspert. Michael Wong, som jobber med flysikkerhet, er forelsket i henne. Yamamoto er stille, tøff og har forlatt politiet i Tokyo for å tilbringe tid med familien. N.B. Filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: Black Mask
programme.desc: En overlevende fra et supersoldatprosjekt må kjempe mot sine tidligere kamerater som en maskert helt. Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: My Lucky Stars NO
programme.desc: Politimannen Muscle fra Hong Kong drar til Japan på jakt etter en korrupt kollega. Men siden yakuzaen allerede har opplysninger om ham, kan han ikke gjøre jobben på egen hånd. Etter hvert kaller de inn barndomsvennene til Muscle for å hjelpe til.

programme.title: The Hand of Death
programme.desc: En kung fu-student må hevne sin mesters død og redde shaolintempelet sitt fra manchuenes terrorvelde. Han slår seg sammen med en løpegutt og en sverdmester for å danne den usannsynlige trioen som skal kjempe for sin ære, mot undertrykkelse.

programme.title: Armor of God NO
programme.desc: Jackie Chan spiller en eventyrer som sammen med kompanjongen sin må reise til Europa når en religiøs sekt kidnapper ungdomskjæresten hans. De utpresser ham for å få tak i den tredje delen av den legendariske rustningen Armour of God.

programme.title: The Fearless Hyena NO
programme.desc: Young Lung viser talent, men tar ikke treningen seriøst. Bestefaren hans, også Shaolin-mester, prøver å lære ham både disiplin og kampsport, men han tar mest til seg det siste. I stedet for å fokusere på treningen, tilbringer han tiden i barer.

programme.title: Zu: Warriors from the Magic Mountain
programme.desc: En kinesisk soldat i en gammel borgerkrig flykter fra slagmarken og blir dratt inn i et fantastisk eventyr for å redde verden fra ondskapen. NB Denne filmen vises uten norske undertekster.

programme.title: The Way of the Dragon NO
programme.desc: Tang Lung (Bruce Lee) reiser til Roma for å hjelpe slektningene sine når restauranten deres blir trakassert av et voldelig kriminalitetssyndikat. Når han er på plass settes Tangs særegne spark virkelig på prøve.

programme.title: Spiritual Kung Fu NO
programme.desc: Yi-Lang er klassens klovn i shaolin-tempelet hvor han studerer kampsport. Når en mystisk bok blir stjålet fra tempelbiblioteket, blir Yi-Lang anklaget for slurv, og sammen med noen andre munker blir han straffet for uoppmerksomhet.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John gets a portable talking computer for his speech-impaired patient, with unintended consequences.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker bores a bartender with a story about his ex-wife's wedding.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie decides to help Jake fulfill some of the dreams he had as a child, with disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Dr. John Becker's laundry, apartment, and mail have all been tampered with and he is sure the culprit is one of his pesky neighbors.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Bob uses a questionable friend to get Reggie a great deal on a new freezer. John acts as a sex therapist for the Bennetts, an 80-year-old couple having difficulties because of Mr. Bennett's newly revived libido.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: An unflattering picture of someone other than John is placed in an article about him, causing him distress.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: When John receives some expensive steaks from a patient, his new neighbor Chris cajoles him into throwing a party.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is surprisingly concerned when he learns that his new neighbor Chris has left town without saying goodbye.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie and Chris compete for John's affection. Linda takes Margaret out for a night on the town.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Now that Reggie is gone, John tells Chris he has feelings for her (Chris).

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John sits on his fire escape, smoking a cigar, the smoke from which is wafting into Chris's open window directly above.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: As John and Jake chat about Chris at the diner, Bob rushes in and announces that he just saw Chris naked when he went to fix her faucet.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker has a videotape of a French film that he plans to use to lure Chris into coming over to his place.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker tries to discourage a friend from expressing interest in Chris by telling him that she is gay.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, Chris is in the kitchen when a robber enters.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the office, Margaret reveals to Linda that it's her ten-year anniversary of working for Dr. Becker.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, John expresses his repulsion for all the Christmas decorations.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker is upset when a patient substitutes his Christian Science faith for medical treatment.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: One of John's patients, a high school student named Brad, comes in for a physical and John learns that the guy's sexually active, but isn't practicing safe sex. John performs an HIV test on Brad and tries to convince him to begin practicing safe sex.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John's at the end of his rope with his hectic practice and makes a call, which Linda overhears, telling the person on the other end that he can't take another day.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John helps his elderly neighbor, Mrs. Firth, get into her apartment and she repays him by making homemade chicken noodle soup.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Bob is distraught because a thirty-something guy at his gym died while on the treadmill, and he's certain that he's headed for the same fate.
programme.sub-title: I’ve Got Friends I Haven’t Used Yet

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: When a customer leaves the diner because of John's cigarette smoke, Chris puts her foot down and tells him that it is now a "smoke-free" restaurant.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John arrives at the diner and announces that he has quit smoking.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John walks into the diner and sees Chris, Bob, and Jake standing around a booth.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Chris' ex-husband, Roger, is in town and comes to the diner to see her.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: The fire marshal threatens to fine Chris for a faulty sprinkler system at the diner, but Chris flirts her way out of it.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John has a dream that he and Chris kissed each other. At the office, Linda is late and tells Margaret it's because her cab got hit by a runaway hotdog cart.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Highlights from last season include Chris and John exchanging "I love yous" as Chris is wheeled into surgery for an appendectomy.
programme.sub-title: What’s Love Got To Do With It?

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake bemoans his poor financial status, and Hector proposes that he participates in a drug-testing program to earn money.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Chris and John have their first impromptu date, but Chris wants something more formal before taking the relationship any further, and tells John so.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John takes Chris out for their first official date - to a cheap Chinese restaurant. both are excited about the possibility of their "first time."

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: As John and Chris get more serious in their relationship, Chris realizes that John is not as affectionate as she'd like him to be.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: It's Thanksgiving and Chris wants to make dinner for John, who is totally against holidays.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, Hector tries to talk Jake into giving him money to invest in coffee futures, but Jake resists.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake receives a letter and is shocked to find out that his late grandmother has left him $25,000.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Victory in the Pacific
programme.desc: Japan continues its suicidal resistance, and invading it looks costly. After 2 atomic bombs, the Emperor intervenes and stops the War. Stalin grabs territory in East Asia. The War is over, and the Atomic Era and the Cold War start.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: France and Spain: The Pyrenees
programme.desc: Monty treks one of the toughest and most famous freedom trails out of Nazi controlled France, taking him through the valleys and high ridges of the Pyrenees mountains and into Spain.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: Vidkun Quisling
programme.desc: Vidkun Quisling, once honored for diplomacy, turned traitor by collaborating with Nazis. His bid for power in Norway failed, relegated by Germans. Despite being named "fuehrer," his reign led to repression until his hanging post-Nazi defeat.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Devil's Due
programme.desc: During WWII, Greek Prime Ministers Tsolakoglou, Logothetopoulos, and Rallis collaborated with Nazi occupiers, imposing fees that caused a famine.

programme.title: Hitler's Mega Plane
programme.desc: In January 2012, Italian divers discovered the wreck of a massive plane off the coast of Sardinia. At a depth of 65 meters (213 feet) lies a Messerschmidt “Gigant”, the biggest aircraft in WWII.

programme.title: Secret War: The Dutch Disaster
programme.desc: Operation North Pole was a WWII German deception using captured SOE agents to mislead Britain. 47 of 50 agents were captured. Despite warnings, SOE ignored signs of compromise to maintain support, leading to a major intelligence failure.

programme.title: Secret War: The Mafia Connection
programme.desc: Lucky Luciano, a mafia boss of the 1930s, was in jail in 1942 on charges of running prostitution rings. US intelligence services did a deal with him and he got the Italians to share intelligence on German U boat movements.

programme.title: Hitler and I: Reflections on Evil
programme.desc: An in-depth, behind-the-scenes exploration of the making of the miniseries "Hitler: The Rise of Evil."

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Arajs Kommando
programme.desc: Viktor Arajs, a Latvian, played a significant role in the Holocaust, collaborating with the Nazis to eliminate Jews. Leading the Arajs Kommando, he orchestrated the killings of around 30,000 Jews. Arajs justified his actions as patriotic defense.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The IRA Conspiracy
programme.desc: During WWII, the IRA's "S Plan" aimed to bomb Britain, drawing German support to weaken the British. "Operation Green" and "Plan Kathleen" envisioned IRA aiding a German invasion of Northern Ireland, but both failed due to bungling and infighting.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Good Collaborators?
programme.desc: Finland defended itself in the Winter War under Marshal Mannerheim. Finland allied with Nazi Germany against the Soviet Union in 1941. Finland later negotiated peace with the Allies and switched sides as Nazi defeat became apparent.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Croatian Collaborator
programme.desc: Croatia grapples with its fascist past through figures like Dinko Sakic, once hailed as a hero but later convicted of war crimes. Leading the notorious Jasenovac camp, Sakic oversaw brutal atrocities against inmates.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Preparing for War
programme.desc: Hitler unveils his military plans: annex Austria, seize the Sudetenland, and eventually invade Poland and the Soviet Union. By March 1938, Austria falls bloodlessly. By September 1939, he invades Poland, sparking World War Two.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Artillery, "The King of Battle," has shaped history from ancient cannons to today's M777 Howitzer. Host Wil Willis visits Fort Sill, Oklahoma, to witness modern artillery like the M777 and M109 Paladin in action.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Weapons That Changed The World examines the RPG-7, renowned for its ability to take on tanks and level buildings. Host Wil Willis traces its evolution from WWII's Bazooka to modern counterparts like the AT-4 and Carl Gustav.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: Japan attacks the USA on 7 Dec 1941. For the next 6 months, they continue to have successful attacks.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: Italy: The Sulmona Trail
programme.desc: Monty follows the route taken by prisoner of war Len Harley, who spent months on the run before braving snow, ice, and Nazi patrols to escape over the mountains of the Majella in Italy.

programme.title: UFC

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Based on the hit US reality show America's Next Top Model this UK version presented by Lisa Snowdon follows the latest group of hopefuls through their journey to becoming Britain's newest 'Top Model'.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Based on the hit US reality show America's Next Top Model this UK version presented by Lisa Snowdon follows the latest group of hopefuls through their journey to becoming Britain's newest 'Top Model'.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The competition begins. The first photo shoot takes place in the Milton Keynes SnowZone with the girls forced to withstand temperatures as low as minus 5 degrees. Immediatley Lianna feels like an outsider, not getting along with other girls.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls get their makeovers and the inevitable tears and tantrums follow. The girls pair up for a girl on girl photo shoot.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls learn about cheese cake pin-up and dancing from Britain's own 'Queen of Burlesque' Immodesty Blaize. Two girls recieve harsh criticism from casting director Beth Charkham when faced with the challenge of a commercial set in a swimming pool.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The remaining models learn about ballroom dancing from top ballroom dancer Brendan Cole and Lianna struggles to get it right. Then they do a full dance with music. One girl gets upset when not chosen by the winner to join her for her reward.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls train with personal trainer Chris Mundle. Then straight after training, sweating and smelling, they head to meet top designers. They have a Gothic Bride photo shoot, with most girls struggling to get a good shot.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The remaining models undergo a heavy metallic make-up photo shoot with John Swanell. Lisa arrives at the house and the girls have to critique each other, which causes even more fights. A practical joke gets taken the wrong way.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls shoot a thirty second jewellery promotion with top promo director Jason Clifford. Lucy, last years winner, visits the girls and gives them some tips. They have a country life photo shoot and there is a shock at elimination.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: With two people gone the house becomes even more divided. The girls meet Saffron Aldridge, top style expert, who goes through their wardrobes with no mercy. They have a one on one with Lisa and the girls are awe-struck when they meet a famous model.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The four remaining models head to Morocco and Lisa gives them the day off. They are given the challenge of finding an outfit for Lisa. They have their first Moroccan photo shoot and the final three are chosen.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: In the finale the three remaining models have their final photo shoot and the final two compete in a catwalk show and one girl is crowned 'Britain's Next Top Model'.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls immediately face their first challenge, posing in front of the press. They then meet stylist Hilary Alexander, who asks them when they lost their virginity and what they think about unprotected sex.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls take part in a catwalk challenge set by Otis Isles, the internationally respected casting director, model agent, and fashion producer, who tells them to dress in underwear.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls arrive at the English National Ballet School, where Lisa introduces them to ballet teacher Louise Halliday. They learn about the art of ballet to help with their movement.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls order a pizza and find Lisa Mail for the challenge the following morning. A huge fight breaks out between Stefanie and Louise.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls are taken to Debenhams, where they get the chance to meet Caprice. They are given fifteen minutes to find an outfit for different occasions.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls arrive at a bar where they meet music video director Paul Hills. Their challenge is to star in a music video along with The Wolfmen.

programme.title: Dare, Dream, Dominate.: The Beginning
programme.desc: Begyndelsen. Mark O Madsen er stoppet som fighter – men kampen er langt fra slut. Sammen med Maria sætter han alt på spil i forsøget på at skabe Danmarks største MMA-show. Næsten allerede fra første skridt er udfordringerne overvældende.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi go to great lengths to secure a loan to fix an unexpected issue on their flip house.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi are eager to book a night away in a hotel after Teddy keeps sleeping in their bed; Kate is allowed to stay home alone but doesn't follow Adam and Andi's strict rules.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam offers to go on a vegan diet with Kate in an effort to bond with her, his love of meat proves a hard habit to break.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: After Adam throws out his back on his 50th birthday, he is still determined to take a dirt bike excursion and check it off his bucket list; Don and Adam give out bonuses at work.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam gets jealous when Teddy names Andi as his hero for a school essay.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam accidentally invites Andi to go on the guys' annual trip, he tries to un-invite her, which only makes matters worse.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam recruits Marcy to put Andi's snooty sister in her place when she comes for a visit.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi see how much Lowell's new relationship with Andi's sister is changing him, they stage an intervention to get him to stop putting up with her bad behavior.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Andi's doctor advises her to stop taking birth control pills, Adam and Andi disagree on an alternate option.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Dave has a cold that has him acting like a baby, and Debbie's treating him like one; Rebecca and Joanna, however, think he's overreacting and are concerned he's going to ruin their spa weekend away

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Don become super protective of Lowell when they think he might get back together with his cheating ex-wife; Joe experiences an unexpected side effect from his new pacemaker.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi offer Teddy dating advice but wind up making things super awkward for him instead.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam encourages Don to give himself food poisoning to get out of babysitting his destructive grandson; Adam and Andi argue over who has to take Kate and her teenage friends dress shopping.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam buys a boat without asking Andi, they wind up in couples therapy to settle the disagreement.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam discovers someone is sneaking his boat out at night, and he assumes the culprits are Don and Joe; after Andi makes Kate get a job at the mall, Kate decides she no longer wants to go to college.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Don disagree about a new house to flip for their construction business, their bickering reveals bigger issues in their relationship; Andi goes to great lengths to throw the perfect birthday party for Bev.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam's mother-in-law Alice makes an unexpected visit and reveals some shocking news.
programme.sub-title: Stuck In The Middle With You

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi resort to their usual punishment in response to Teddy's bad grades, his unexpected reaction catches them off guard.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi attempt to spice up their social life by making new friends.
programme.sub-title: Adam and Andi See Other People

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam has trouble helping Katie prepare for her driving test; Don turns to Lowell for help romancing Marcy.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam tries to give Andi the perfect 20th wedding anniversary gift by re-creating their honeymoon.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Morimoto fights a traditionalist chef who fills his dishes with nostalgia.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Meiji Kinenkan is the oldest bridal hall in Japan undergoing an upgrade to celebrate its 50th anniversary. This includes the addition of a Chinese restaurant and its new grand chef.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Chen stirs up his best yogurt presentation against Challenger Junichi Ito.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Morimoto battles with Challenger Tsuyoshi Kajimoto as they innovate with abalone, a shellfish.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The Iron Chef is called upon to face Miyoko Sakai, a famed Thai food critic who has had the privilege to learn the secrets of royal Thai cuisine straight from the source.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Morimoto faces another traditionalist who is infamous for his temper, his steadfast discipline and his adherence to tradition.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The challenger in this battle of peach is Masanobu Watabe, owner of Le Rameau d'Or in Yokohama, Japan. Watabe runs the entire 22-seat restaurant by himself.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Chen's challenger is a man who masters Chaozhou-style Chinese cuisine, an exacting style that is actually able to please the sensitive tastes of customers in Kyoto.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Sakai battles the 'conjurer of garlic,' a chef who embraces the pungent ingredient as real Italians do. Sakai is further challenged to use live squids in the dishes.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Three years after losing to Iron Chef Chen, the Italian restaurant Sabatini demands a rematch, this time sending in the master chef of their Tokyo restaurant.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Led by Tadamichi Ohta, the chef who defeated Sakai, the Ohta faction invades Kitchen Stadium to uphold traditional Japanese cuisine. Fuji is team Ohta's first contender against Morimoto.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: In honor of the Girls' Festival, Kaga invites a challenger from the ancient city of Kamakura, Motohito Kondo, who was trained in Kyoto and is an expert in both tea and sake.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Tasaki is a world champion sommelier who has always dreamed of becoming a famed chef. Chairman Kaga decides to grant him his wish.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The American chef Ron Seigel challenges Iron Chef Sakai in this battle of lobster. Who will emerge victorious?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The first female challenger at Kitchen Stadium, the 26-year-old Kagata defeated Chef Chen. Years later, she returns to fight Chen again with milk-fed veal.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Natto, a Japanese delicacy, is the ingredient of battle for Iron Chef Morimoto and Tatsutoshi Kumamoto.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Kobe is pitted against an unusual chef of Italian cuisine who operates out of his own food cart.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Nagayama was brought in to revive the venerated Tokyo University restaurant Shochiku and now he will fight against an Iron Chef.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: When it comes to Bok Choy, you know that Iron Chef Chen will be there to defend his honor against Hisao Yaginuma.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Daniel wants FantomWorks to swap out the V6 of his 1968 Mustang Convertible with the V8 from a donor car. Stacia and Eugenia need Dan’s help to transform their quirky 1962 Citroen 2CV from a ‘problem child’ to a reliable car.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Nikkos wants a spectacular 1968 Mustang Fastback resto-mod. The all-metal masterpiece catches the eye of someone who wants it at any cost. Jim and Arlene want to enjoy their 45th anniversary in the same 1969 Firebird they rode in on their wedding day.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Mike wants Dan to make his prized Mach 1 even more of a muscle car. Richard brings FantomWorks the first ‘his and hers’ restoration – a Sunbeam Tiger and a Fiat Spider – but as Dan soon discovers; the challenges of the two cars are not equal.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: When Gray brings his 1929 Phaeton in, Dan uncovers deadly dangers that lead to lifesaving repairs. Tony believes his 1989 Jeep Wrangler is 95% done, but the car is a rolling disaster of bad work, tangled wires and incompatible parts.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Ron and Valerie want Dan to restore their 1963 Jeep Willy’s Fleetvan, but the problems run deeper than the seams hidden beneath inches of filler. Grady’s Z28 breaks down so often that he’s never had it out of second gear.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie and the team are fresh off of winning some awards in Galveston, Texas. Moody Gardens Classic Car show is always a blast.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie and the team at Muscle Cars of Texas are tackling the electrical of the 1966 Blue Mustang. The 1969 Chevelle Malibu is in the paint shop.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: David is a Volkswagen fanatic who wants a 1967 Beetle that can outmatch muscle cars. Robert wants a widened 1967 Corvette supercar, but first FantomWorks have to undo the bad repairs from at least three fiberglass rending accidents.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Joe challenges FantomWorks to build a replica of a legendary 1953 hydroplane that set a water speed record. Andy wants the perfect split window top for his 1963 corvette, but Dan finds hidden problems that launch a cross country search for parts.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Nick challenges Dan to build a 1969 Camaro Pace Car that can beat the fastest Chevelle that FantomWorks has ever built. Pete’s Mustang Convertible was in three different shops, but it arrives with far more problems than anyone was expecting.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Dan and the team take on the restorations of a 1965 Mustang fastback and a 1951 Studebaker truck. The mustang is for a friend whose plans are far bigger than his budget, and the Studebaker needs a unique design to make it a world-class show vehicle.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Firepower Operation
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Dave traded for his dream 1957 Corvette more than three decades ago, but his plans to build it have so far come to nothing. Ken chose a rare 1954 Kaiser Darrin from his father’s collection and its now on FantomWorks to reverse the hands of time.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Bob spent years working on his beloved 1969 K20 Truck, but he needs FantomWorks to solve the mysteries within. Dan’s brother-in-law John shows up with a 1962 Ferrari kit car that looks hot, but the wiring could burn it to the ground.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Steve has only driven his prized 1969 Camaro Z28 at five miles an hour, but he wants it to be a muscle car beast. Scott owns a rare matching numbers 1964 Corvette that he wants brought back to life.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Nick bought his wife Danielle a 1953 Chevy Pickup for her 28th birthday. The couple wants a perfect FantomWorks restoration. The truck has other ideas. Eric’s rare 1939 LaSalle is a sight to behold, but it hasn’t seen a wrench in eighty years.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Rick comes to FantomWorks for a nightmare combination of gadgets, gizmos, and upgrades for his 1972 Cadillac Hearse. Merlyn and Lynn are farmers from Minnesota with a 1959 Chevy Apache that’s so dangerous they’ve never driven it beyond their driveway.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie and Jan are visiting Mecum Auctions in Houston, Texas checking out some of the coolest classic muscle cars about to hit the auction block!

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Ian wants a 1956 ‘baby bird’ restomod that drives like a sports car. Dan’s solution – a GTO-Thunderbird combo that drives like a bat out of hell. Doc Pellerin’s 1937 Volvo was a regular winner at Concours car shows – until a shelf fell on the car…

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Patsy and Apryle bring their 1968 Corvette in for mechanical work, but what their car really needs is a new paint job. Jim’s 1958 Impala is an auction car. It looks pretty but when it’s time to drive – it’s half the car Jim was hoping for.

programme.title: World Seniors Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker 900 er den nye hurtige og spennende versjonen av spillet! Kom og se ukentlige konkurranser, arkiv spill, studio segmenter og mye mer.

programme.title: Snooker
programme.desc: Live coverage from a top-level snooker event on the International circuit.

programme.title: Snooker
programme.desc: Live coverage from a top-level snooker event on the International circuit.

programme.title: Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker 900 is the new fast, 15-minute version of snooker. It features legends like Jimmy White and showcases top amateurs, juniors, women, and disabled players.

programme.title: Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker 900 is the new fast, 15-minute version of snooker. It features legends like Jimmy White and showcases top amateurs, juniors, women, and disabled players.

programme.title: Rocket Method
programme.desc: Considered the greatest player in the history of snooker, Ronnie O'Sullivan pulls back the curtain on his secrets to success.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: An estranged daughter is writing a vengeful expose about her mother, a much-beloved movie star.

programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark visit a halfway house for people who were confined to mental facilities but released because they were deemed no longer a danger to society.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark work as police detectives in a school. Their assignment: to investigate drug selling.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A fisherman's livelihood is in jeopardy because of the amount of time he devotes to his comatose son.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A young man learns that the girl he's in love with is pregnant.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A lonely spy-story writer buys her murdered hero's sports car, which comes complete with his ghost.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A cold-hearted businessman is given the opportunity to relive the last week of his life. And he tries to do the right thing this time.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A runaway dog unites a boy in an orphanage with its human family.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: The orphan boy has formed an attachment to the dog, although he is going away to living with a new foster family.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A trainer is reminded of his own shady past when a fighter he's been mentoring is asked to take a fall.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark must help a doctor confront a secret he's kept from everyone, including his own family.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven

programme.desc: Jonathan casts a retired comic and his movie-star son in a play about a father and son who never got to know each other.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A youngster turns to a fantasy world and a comic-book superhero to cope with the pain of his father's death.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven

programme.sub-title: All the Colors of the Heart

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark take on a system that keeps inmate mothers and their children apart.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: The patriarch of a ranch family feels he's too old to rein in some wild horses.

programme.desc: Lawyer William Thorne defends an innocent woman threatened by bigotry and mob violence in an Arizona town.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: When her cow is killed by a train, Lucy Tutaine is outraged by the indifference to her financial loss.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: The story of Amadeo Giannini and the creation of the Bank of America.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A rancher who has been threatened refuses Matt's help.

programme.desc: Ned Buntline arrives in Dodge City broke looking for help from Earp who is happy to help in return for the Buntline special.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A marshal takes on a mission to retrieve a stolen wedding dress while an outlaw gang runs wild.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
